changes.title: Dreaming/内存-wiki: 添加 ChatGPT import ingestion plus new `Imported Insights` 和 `内存 Palace` diary subtabs so Dreaming can inspect imported source chats, compiled wiki pages, 和 full source pages directly 从 the 界面. (#64505)
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/memory-wiki: add ChatGPT import ingestion plus new `Imported Insights` and `Memory Palace` diary subtabs so Dreaming can inspect imported source chats, compiled wiki pages, and full source pages directly from the UI. (#64505)

changes.title: Control 界面/webchat: render assistant media/reply/语音 directives as structured chat bubbles, 添加 the `[embed ...]` rich output tag, 和 gate external embed URLs behind 配置. (#64104)
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/webchat: render assistant media/reply/voice directives as structured chat bubbles, add the `[embed ...]` rich output tag, and gate external embed URLs behind config. (#64104)

changes.title: Tools/video_generate: 添加 URL-only generated asset delivery, typed `providerOptions`, reference audio inputs, per-asset role hints, `adaptive` aspect-ratio 支持, 和 a higher image-input cap so video providers can expose richer generation modes 不适用 forcing large files 进入 内存. (#61987, #61988) Thanks @xieyongliang.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/video_generate: add URL-only generated asset delivery, typed `providerOptions`, reference audio inputs, per-asset role hints, `adaptive` aspect-ratio support, and a higher image-input cap so video providers can expose richer generation modes without forcing large files into memory. (#61987, #61988) Thanks @xieyongliang.

changes.title: 飞书: 改进 document comment sessions 使用 richer context parsing, comment reactions, 和 typing feedback so document-thread conversations behave more like chat conversations. (#63785)
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: improve document comment sessions with richer context parsing, comment reactions, and typing feedback so document-thread conversations behave more like chat conversations. (#63785)

changes.title: Microsoft Teams: 添加 reaction 支持, reaction listing, Graph pagination, 和 delegated OAuth认证 setup 为了 sending reactions while preserving application-认证 read paths. (#51646)
changes.rawTitle: Microsoft Teams: add reaction support, reaction listing, Graph pagination, and delegated OAuth setup for sending reactions while preserving application-auth read paths. (#51646)

changes.title: 插件: 允许 插件 manifests to declare activation 和 setup descriptors so 插件 setup flows can describe required 认证, pairing, 和 configuration steps 不适用 hardcoded core special cases. (#64780)
changes.rawTitle: Plugins: allow plugin manifests to declare activation and setup descriptors so plugin setup flows can describe required auth, pairing, and configuration steps without hardcoded core special cases. (#64780)

changes.title: Ollama: cache `/API/show` context-window 和 capability metadata 期间 模型 discovery so repeated picker refreshes 停止 refetching unchanged 模型, while still retrying 之后 empty responses 和 invalidating 在 digest changes. (#64753) Thanks @ImLukeF.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama: cache `/api/show` context-window and capability metadata during model discovery so repeated picker refreshes stop refetching unchanged models, while still retrying after empty responses and invalidating on digest changes. (#64753) Thanks @ImLukeF.

changes.title: 模型/providers: surface how configured OpenAI-compatible endpoints are classified 在 embedded-Agent debug logs, so local 和 代理 routing issues are easier to diagnose. (#64754) Thanks @ImLukeF.
changes.rawTitle: Models/providers: surface how configured OpenAI-compatible endpoints are classified in embedded-agent debug logs, so local and proxy routing issues are easier to diagnose. (#64754) Thanks @ImLukeF.

changes.title: QA/parity: 添加 the GPT-5.4 vs Opus 4.6 agentic parity report gate 使用 shared scenario coverage checks, stricter evidence heuristics, 和 skipped-scenario accounting 为了 maintainer review. (#64441) Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: QA/parity: add the GPT-5.4 vs Opus 4.6 agentic parity report gate with shared scenario coverage checks, stricter evidence heuristics, and skipped-scenario accounting for maintainer review. (#64441) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex OAuth认证: 停止 rewriting the upstream authorize URL scopes so new Codex sign-ins do not fail 使用 `invalid_scope` 之前 returning an authorization code. (#64713) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex OAuth: stop rewriting the upstream authorize URL scopes so new Codex sign-ins do not fail with `invalid_scope` before returning an authorization code. (#64713) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

changes.title: Audio transcription: 禁用 pinned DNS only 为了 OpenAI-compatible multipart requests, while still validating hostnames, so OpenAI, Groq, 和 Mistral transcription works 重新 不适用 weakening other request paths. (#64766) Thanks @GodsBoy.
changes.rawTitle: Audio transcription: disable pinned DNS only for OpenAI-compatible multipart requests, while still validating hostnames, so OpenAI, Groq, and Mistral transcription works again without weakening other request paths. (#64766) Thanks @GodsBoy.

changes.title: macOS/Talk Mode: 之后 granting microphone permission 在 first 启用, continue starting Talk Mode 而不是 requiring a second toggle. (#62459) Thanks @ggarber.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/Talk Mode: after granting microphone permission on first enable, continue starting Talk Mode instead of requiring a second toggle. (#62459) Thanks @ggarber.

changes.title: Control 界面/webchat: persist Agent-run TTS audio replies 进入 webchat history 和 保留 interleaved 工具 card pairing so generated audio 和 mixed 工具 output stay attached to the right messages. (#63514) Thanks @bittoby.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/webchat: persist agent-run TTS audio replies into webchat history and preserve interleaved tool card pairing so generated audio and mixed tool output stay attached to the right messages. (#63514) Thanks @bittoby.

changes.title: WhatsApp: honor the configured default account 当 the active listener helper is used 不适用 an explicit account id, so named default accounts do not get registered under `default`. (#53918) Thanks @yhyatt.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: honor the configured default account when the active listener helper is used without an explicit account id, so named default accounts do not get registered under `default`. (#53918) Thanks @yhyatt.

changes.title: ACP/Agent: suppress commentary-phase child assistant relay text 在 ACP parent stream updates, so spawned child runs 停止 leaking internal progress chatter 进入 the parent session. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/agents: suppress commentary-phase child assistant relay text in ACP parent stream updates, so spawned child runs stop leaking internal progress chatter into the parent session. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/timeouts: honor explicit run timeouts 在 the LLM idle watchdog 和 align default 超时 配置 so slow 模型 can keep working until the configured limit 而不是 using the wrong idle window.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/timeouts: honor explicit run timeouts in the LLM idle watchdog and align default timeout config so slow models can keep working until the configured limit instead of using the wrong idle window.

changes.title: 配置: include `asyncCompletion` 在 the generated zod schema so documented async completion 配置 no longer fails 使用 an unrecognized-密钥 错误. (#63618)
changes.rawTitle: Config: include `asyncCompletion` in the generated zod schema so documented async completion config no longer fails with an unrecognized-key error. (#63618)

changes.title: Google/Veo: 停止 sending the unsupported `numberOfVideos` request field so Gemini Developer API Veo runs do not fail 之前 OpenClaw can complete the intended Google video generation 路径. (#64723) Thanks @velvet-shark.
changes.rawTitle: Google/Veo: stop sending the unsupported `numberOfVideos` request field so Gemini Developer API Veo runs do not fail before OpenClaw can complete the intended Google video generation path. (#64723) Thanks @velvet-shark.

changes.title: QA/packaging: 停止 packaged CLI startup 和 completion cache generation 从 reading repo-only QA scenario markdown, ship the bundled QA scenario pack 在 npm releases, 和 keep `openclaw completion --write-state` working even if QA setup is broken. (#64648) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: QA/packaging: stop packaged CLI startup and completion cache generation from reading repo-only QA scenario markdown, ship the bundled QA scenario pack in npm releases, and keep `openclaw completion --write-state` working even if QA setup is broken. (#64648) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Codex/QA: keep Codex app-server coordination chatter out 的 visible replies, 添加 a live QA leak scenario, 和 classify leaked harness meta text as a QA failure 而不是 a successful reply. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/QA: keep Codex app-server coordination chatter out of visible replies, add a live QA leak scenario, and classify leaked harness meta text as a QA failure instead of a successful reply. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: WhatsApp: route `message react` through the 网关-owned action 路径 so reactions use the live WhatsApp listener 在 both DM 和 group chats, matching `message send` 和 `message poll`. Thanks @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: route `message react` through the gateway-owned action path so reactions use the live WhatsApp listener in both DM and group chats, matching `message send` and `message poll`. Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.title: Auto-reply/WhatsApp: 保留 inbound image attachment notes 之后 media understanding so image edits keep the real saved media 路径 而不是 hallucinating a missing local 路径. (#64918) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/WhatsApp: preserve inbound image attachment notes after media understanding so image edits keep the real saved media path instead of hallucinating a missing local path. (#64918) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: Telegram/sessions: keep topic-scoped session initialization 在 the canonical topic transcript 路径 当 inbound turns omit `MessageThreadId`, so one topic session no longer alternates 之间 bare 和 topic-qualified transcript files. (#64869) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/sessions: keep topic-scoped session initialization on the canonical topic transcript path when inbound turns omit `MessageThreadId`, so one topic session no longer alternates between bare and topic-qualified transcript files. (#64869) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Agent/failover: scope assistant-side fallback classification 和 surfaced provider errors to the current attempt 而不是 stale session history, so cross-provider fallback runs 停止 inheriting the previous provider's failure. (#62907) Thanks @stainlu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: scope assistant-side fallback classification and surfaced provider errors to the current attempt instead of stale session history, so cross-provider fallback runs stop inheriting the previous provider's failure. (#62907) Thanks @stainlu.

changes.title: MiniMax/OAuth认证: write `API: "Anthropic-messages"` 和 `authHeader: true` 进入 the `MiniMax-portal` 配置 patch 期间 `openclaw configure`, so re-authenticated portal setups keep Bearer 认证 routing working. (#64964) Thanks @ryanlee666.
changes.rawTitle: MiniMax/OAuth: write `api: "anthropic-messages"` and `authHeader: true` into the `minimax-portal` config patch during `openclaw configure`, so re-authenticated portal setups keep Bearer auth routing working. (#64964) Thanks @ryanlee666.

changes.title: 内存/Active 内存: 添加 a new optional Active 内存 插件 that gives OpenClaw a dedicated 内存 sub-Agent right 之前 the main reply, so ongoing chats can automatically pull 在 relevant preferences, context, 和 past details 不适用 making users remember to manually say "remember this" 或 "search 内存" first. Includes configurable message/recent/full context modes, live `/verbose` inspection, advanced prompt/thinking overrides 为了 tuning, 和 opt-在 transcript persistence 为了 debugging. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/active-内存. (#63286) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/Active Memory: add a new optional Active Memory plugin that gives OpenClaw a dedicated memory sub-agent right before the main reply, so ongoing chats can automatically pull in relevant preferences, context, and past details without making users remember to manually say "remember this" or "search memory" first. Includes configurable message/recent/full context modes, live `/verbose` inspection, advanced prompt/thinking overrides for tuning, and opt-in transcript persistence for debugging. Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/active-memory. (#63286) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Conversation bindings: normalize focused/current conversation ids, 保留 binding metadata 在 account 和 Discord rebinds, 避免 stale Discord lifecycle Windows, 和 keep generic activity touches persisted so reply routing survives rebinds 和 restarts.
changes.rawTitle: Conversation bindings: normalize focused/current conversation ids, preserve binding metadata on account and Discord rebinds, avoid stale Discord lifecycle windows, and keep generic activity touches persisted so reply routing survives rebinds and restarts.

changes.title: iMessage/self-chat: distinguish normal DM outbound rows 从 true self-chat using `destination_caller_id` plus chat participants, 保留 multi-处理 self-chat aliases, drop ambiguous reflected echoes, 和 strip wrapped imsg RPC text fields. (#61619, #63868, #63980, #63989, #64000) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: iMessage/self-chat: distinguish normal DM outbound rows from true self-chat using `destination_caller_id` plus chat participants, preserve multi-handle self-chat aliases, drop ambiguous reflected echoes, and strip wrapped imsg RPC text fields. (#61619, #63868, #63980, #63989, #64000) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Matrix: keep multi-account room scoping consistent, keep packaged crypto migrations warning-only 当 appropriate, 保留 ordered block streaming, 添加 explicit Matrix block-streaming opt-在, 和 解决 verification/bootstrap 从 the packaged runtime entry. (#58449, #59249, #59266, #64373) Thanks @gumadeiras.

(#58449, #59249, #59266, #64373) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Telegram/安全: tighten Telegram `allowFrom` sender validation 和 keep `/whoami` allowlist reporting 在 sync 使用 命令 认证 checks.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/security: tighten Telegram `allowFrom` sender validation and keep `/whoami` allowlist reporting in sync with command auth checks.

changes.title: Agent/timeouts: extend the default LLM idle window to 120s 和 keep silent no-令牌 idle timeouts 在 recovery paths, so slow 模型 can 重试 或 fall back 之前 users see an 错误.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/timeouts: extend the default LLM idle window to 120s and keep silent no-token idle timeouts on recovery paths, so slow models can retry or fall back before users see an error.

changes.title: 网关/Agent: 保留 configured 模型 selection 和 richer `IDENTITY.md` content across Agent create/更新 flows 和 workspace moves, 和 fail safely 而不是 静默地 overwriting unreadable identity files. (#61577) Thanks @samzong.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/agents: preserve configured model selection and richer `IDENTITY.md` content across agent create/update flows and workspace moves, and fail safely instead of silently overwriting unreadable identity files. (#61577) Thanks @samzong.

changes.title: Skills/TaskFlow: restore valid frontmatter fences 为了 the bundled `taskflow` 和 `taskflow-inbox-triage` skills 和 copy bundled `SKILL.md` files as hard dist-runtime copies so skills stay discoverable 和 loadable 之后 updates. (#64166, #64469) Thanks @extrasmall0.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/TaskFlow: restore valid frontmatter fences for the bundled `taskflow` and `taskflow-inbox-triage` skills and copy bundled `SKILL.md` files as hard dist-runtime copies so skills stay discoverable and loadable after updates. (#64166, #64469) Thanks @extrasmall0.

changes.title: Skills: respect overridden home directories 当 loading personal skills so service, test, 和 custom launch environments read the intended user skill directory 而不是 the process home.
changes.rawTitle: Skills: respect overridden home directories when loading personal skills so service, test, and custom launch environments read the intended user skill directory instead of the process home.

changes.title: Windows/exec: settle supervisor waits 从 child exit state 之后 stdout 和 stderr drain even 当 `close` never arrives, so CLI commands 停止 hanging 或 dying 使用 forced `SIGKILL` 在 Windows. (#64072) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/exec: settle supervisor waits from child exit state after stdout and stderr drain even when `close` never arrives, so CLI commands stop hanging or dying with forced `SIGKILL` on Windows. (#64072) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 浏览器/sandbox: 防止 sandbox 浏览器 CDP startup hangs 通过 recreating containers 当 the 浏览器 安全 hash changes 和 通过 waiting 在 the correct sandbox 浏览器 lifecycle. (#62873) Thanks @Syysean.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/sandbox: prevent sandbox browser CDP startup hangs by recreating containers when the browser security hash changes and by waiting on the correct sandbox browser lifecycle. (#62873) Thanks @Syysean.

changes.title: QQBot/streaming: make block streaming configurable per QQ bot account via `streaming.mode` (`"partial"` | `"off"`, default `"partial"`) 而不是 hardcoding it off, so responses can be delivered incrementally. (#63746)
changes.rawTitle: QQBot/streaming: make block streaming configurable per QQ bot account via `streaming.mode` (`"partial"` | `"off"`, default `"partial"`) instead of hardcoding it off, so responses can be delivered incrementally. (#63746)

changes.title: QQBot/配置: 允许 extra fields 在 `channels.qqbot` 和 `channels.qqbot.accounts.*` so extended qqbot builds can 添加 new 配置 options 不适用 网关 startup failing 在 schema validation. (#64075) Thanks @WideLee.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot/config: allow extra fields in `channels.qqbot` and `channels.qqbot.accounts.*` so extended qqbot builds can add new config options without gateway startup failing on schema validation. (#64075) Thanks @WideLee.

changes.title: Dreaming/网关: require `operator.admin` 为了 persistent `/dreaming 在|off` changes 和 treat missing 网关 client scopes as unprivileged 而不是 静默地 allowing 配置 writes. (#63872) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Dreaming/gateway: require `operator.admin` for persistent `/dreaming on|off` changes and treat missing gateway client scopes as unprivileged instead of silently allowing config writes. (#63872) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: 网关/pairing: prefer explicit QR bootstrap 认证 over earlier Tailscale 认证 classification so iOS `/pair qr` silent bootstrap pairing does not fall through to `pairing required`. (#59232) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: prefer explicit QR bootstrap auth over earlier Tailscale auth classification so iOS `/pair qr` silent bootstrap pairing does not fall through to `pairing required`. (#59232) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 浏览器/control: auto-generate 浏览器-control 认证 tokens 为了 `none` 和 `trusted-代理` modes, 和 route 浏览器 认证/profile/诊断工具 helpers through the public 浏览器 插件 facades. (#63280, #63957) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 浏览器/act: centralize `/act` request normalization 和 execution dispatch while adding stable machine-readable route-level 错误 codes 为了 invalid requests, selector misuse, evaluate-disabled gating, target mismatch, 和 existing-session unsupported actions. (#63977) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/act: centralize `/act` request normalization and execution dispatch while adding stable machine-readable route-level error codes for invalid requests, selector misuse, evaluate-disabled gating, target mismatch, and existing-session unsupported actions. changes.title: 安全/QQBot: enforce media storage boundaries 为了 all outbound local file paths 和 route image-size probes through SSRF-guarded media fetching 而不是 raw `fetch()`. (#63271, #63495) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Security/QQBot: enforce media storage boundaries for all outbound local file paths and route image-size probes through SSRF-guarded media fetching instead of raw `fetch()`. (#63271, #63495) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.rawTitle: Channel setup: ignore workspace plugin shadows when resolving trusted channel setup catalog entries so onboarding and setup flows keep using the bundled, trusted setup contract.

changes.title: 网关/内存 startup: load the explicitly selected 内存-slot 插件 期间 网关 startup, while keeping restrictive allowlists 和 implicit default 内存 slots 从 auto-starting unrelated 内存 插件. (#64423) Thanks @EronFan.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/memory startup: load the explicitly selected memory-slot plugin during gateway startup, while keeping restrictive allowlists and implicit default memory slots from auto-starting unrelated memory plugins. (#64423) Thanks @EronFan.

changes.title: 配置/插件: let 配置 writes keep disabled 插件 entries 不适用 forcing required 插件 配置 schemas 或 crashing raw 插件 validation, 和 避免 re-activating 插件 registry state 期间 schema checks. (#54971, #63296) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

Includes configurable message/recent/full context modes, live `/verbose` inspection, advanced prompt/thinking overrides for tuning, and opt-in transcript persistence for debugging. items.title: Agent/exec: 防止 网关 崩溃 ("Agent listener invoked outside active run") 当 a subagent exec 工具 produces stdout/stderr 之后 the Agent run has ended 或 been aborted. (#62821) Thanks @openperf.
items.rawTitle: Agents/exec: prevent gateway crash ("Agent listener invoked outside active run") when a subagent exec tool produces stdout/stderr after the agent run has ended or been aborted. (#62821) Thanks @openperf.

items.title: Agent/subagents: deduplicate delivered completion announces so 重试 或 re-entry cleanup does not inject duplicate internal-context completion turns 进入 the parent session. (#61525) Thanks @100yenadmin.
items.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: deduplicate delivered completion announces so retry or re-entry cleanup does not inject duplicate internal-context completion turns into the parent session. (#61525) Thanks @100yenadmin.

items.title: Agent/exec: keep sandboxed `tools.exec.host=auto` sessions 从 honoring per-call `host=node` 或 `host=网关` overrides while a sandbox runtime is active, 和 停止 advertising node routing 在 that state so exec stays 在 the sandbox host. (#63880)
items.rawTitle: Agents/exec: keep sandboxed `tools.exec.host=auto` sessions from honoring per-call `host=node` or `host=gateway` overrides while a sandbox runtime is active, and stop advertising node routing in that state so exec stays on the sandbox host. (#63880)

items.title: Agent/subagents: 保留 archived delete-mode runs until `sessions.delete` succeeds 和 防止 overlapping archive sweeps 从 duplicating 在-flight cleanup attempts. (#61801) Thanks @100yenadmin.
items.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: preserve archived delete-mode runs until `sessions.delete` succeeds and prevent overlapping archive sweeps from duplicating in-flight cleanup attempts. (#61801) Thanks @100yenadmin.

items.title: Cron/isolated Agent: run scheduled Agent turns as non-owner senders so owner-only tools stay unavailable 期间 cron execution. (#63878)
items.rawTitle: Cron/isolated agent: run scheduled agent turns as non-owner senders so owner-only tools stay unavailable during cron execution. (#63878)

items.title: Agent/exec: extend exec completion detection to cover local background exec formats so the owner-downgrade fires 正确地 为了 all exec paths. (#64376) Thanks @mmaps.
items.rawTitle: Agents/exec: extend exec completion detection to cover local background exec formats so the owner-downgrade fires correctly for all exec paths. (#64376) Thanks @mmaps.

items.title: Hooks/安全: mark Agent hook system events as untrusted 和 sanitize hook display names 之前 cron metadata 复用. (#64372) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Hooks/security: mark agent hook system events as untrusted and sanitize hook display names before cron metadata reuse. (#64372) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: Heartbeat/配置: accept 和 honor `Agent.defaults.heartbeat.timeoutSeconds` 和 per-Agent heartbeat 超时 overrides 为了 heartbeat Agent turns. (#64491) Thanks @cedillarack.
items.rawTitle: Heartbeat/config: accept and honor `agents.defaults.heartbeat.timeoutSeconds` and per-agent heartbeat timeout overrides for heartbeat agent turns. (#64491) Thanks @cedillarack.

items.title: 浏览器/安全: tighten 浏览器 和 sandbox navigation defenses across strict SSRF defaults, hostname allowlists, interaction-driven redirects, subframes, CDP discovery, existing sessions, tab actions, noVNC, marker-span sanitization, 和 Docker CDP source-range enforcement. (#61404, #63332, #63882, #63885, #63889, #64367, #64370, #64371)
items.rawTitle: Browser/security: tighten browser and sandbox navigation defenses across strict SSRF defaults, hostname allowlists, interaction-driven redirects, subframes, CDP discovery, existing sessions, tab actions, noVNC, marker-span sanitization, and Docker CDP source-range enforcement. (#61404, #63332, #63882, #63885, #63889, #64367, #64370, #64371)

items.title: Control 界面/BTW: render `/btw` side results as dismissible ephemeral cards 在 the 浏览器, send `/btw` immediately 期间 active runs, 和 clear stale BTW cards 在 reset flows so webchat matches the intended detached side-question behavior. (#64290) Thanks @ngutman.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/BTW: render `/btw` side results as dismissible ephemeral cards in the browser, send `/btw` immediately during active runs, and clear stale BTW cards on reset flows so webchat matches the intended detached side-question behavior. (#64290) Thanks @ngutman.

items.title: 浏览器/sandbox: 防止 sandbox 浏览器 CDP startup hangs 通过 recreating containers 当 the 浏览器 安全 hash changes 和 通过 waiting 在 the correct sandbox 浏览器 lifecycle. (#62873) Thanks @Syysean.
items.rawTitle: Browser/sandbox: prevent sandbox browser CDP startup hangs by recreating containers when the browser security hash changes and by waiting on the correct sandbox browser lifecycle. (#62873) Thanks @Syysean.

items.title: 浏览器/control: auto-generate 浏览器-control 认证 tokens 为了 `none` 和 `trusted-代理` modes, 和 route 浏览器 认证/profile/诊断工具 helpers through the public 浏览器 插件 facades. (#63280, #63957) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: Browser/control: auto-generate browser-control auth tokens for `none` and `trusted-proxy` modes, and route browser auth/profile/doctor helpers through the public browser plugin facades. (#63280, #63957) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: 浏览器/act: centralize `/act` request normalization 和 execution dispatch while adding stable machine-readable route-level 错误 codes 为了 invalid requests, selector misuse, evaluate-disabled gating, target mismatch, 和 existing-session unsupported actions. (#63977) Thanks @joshavant.
items.rawTitle: Browser/act: centralize `/act` request normalization and execution dispatch while adding stable machine-readable route-level error codes for invalid requests, selector misuse, evaluate-disabled gating, target mismatch, and existing-session unsupported actions. (#63977) Thanks @joshavant.

items.title: 浏览器/安全: reject strict-policy hostname navigation unless the hostname is an explicit allowlist exception 或 IP literal, 和 route CDP HTTP discovery through the pinned SSRF fetch 路径. (#64367) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Browser/security: reject strict-policy hostname navigation unless the hostname is an explicit allowlist exception or IP literal, and route CDP HTTP discovery through the pinned SSRF fetch path. (#64367) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 安全/QQBot: enforce media storage boundaries 为了 all outbound local file paths 和 route image-size probes through SSRF-guarded media fetching 而不是 raw `fetch()`. (#63271, #63495) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: Security/QQBot: enforce media storage boundaries for all outbound local file paths and route image-size probes through SSRF-guarded media fetching instead of raw `fetch()`. (#63271, #63495) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: Media/安全: honor sender-scoped `toolsBySender` policy 为了 outbound host-media reads so denied senders cannot trigger host file disclosure via attachment hydration. (#64459) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Media/security: honor sender-scoped `toolsBySender` policy for outbound host-media reads so denied senders cannot trigger host file disclosure via attachment hydration. (#64459) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: Heartbeat: ignore doc-only Markdown fence markers 在 the default `HEARTBEAT.md` template so comment-only heartbeat scaffolds skip API calls 重新. (#61690, #63434) Thanks @ravyg.
items.rawTitle: Heartbeat: ignore doc-only Markdown fence markers in the default `HEARTBEAT.md` template so comment-only heartbeat scaffolds skip API calls again. (#61690, #63434) Thanks @ravyg.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: 添加 a grounded REM backfill lane 使用 historical `rem-harness --路径`, diary commit/reset flows, cleaner durable-fact extraction, 和 live short-term promotion integration so old daily notes can replay 进入 Dreams 和 durable 内存 不适用 a second 内存 stack. Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: add a grounded REM backfill lane with historical `rem-harness --path`, diary commit/reset flows, cleaner durable-fact extraction, and live short-term promotion integration so old daily notes can replay into Dreams and durable memory without a second memory stack. Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Control 界面/dreaming: 添加 a structured diary view 使用 timeline navigation, backfill/reset controls, traceable dreaming summaries, 和 a grounded Scene lane 使用 promotion hints plus a safe clear-grounded action 为了 staged backfill signals. (#63395) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/dreaming: add a structured diary view with timeline navigation, backfill/reset controls, traceable dreaming summaries, and a grounded Scene lane with promotion hints plus a safe clear-grounded action for staged backfill signals. (#63395) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: QA/lab: 添加 character-vibes evaluation reports 使用 模型 selection 和 parallel runs so live QA can compare candidate behavior faster.
changes.rawTitle: QA/lab: add character-vibes evaluation reports with model selection and parallel runs so live QA can compare candidate behavior faster.

changes.title: 插件/provider-认证: let provider manifests declare `providerAuthAliases` so provider variants can share env vars, 认证 profiles, 配置-backed 认证, 和 API-密钥 onboarding choices 不适用 core-specific wiring.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/provider-auth: let provider manifests declare `providerAuthAliases` so provider variants can share env vars, auth profiles, config-backed auth, and API-key onboarding choices without core-specific wiring.

changes.title: iOS: pin release versioning to an explicit CalVer 在 `apps/ios/version.json`, keep TestFlight iteration 在 the same short version until maintainers intentionally promote the next 网关 version, 和 添加 the documented `pnpm ios:version:pin -- --从-网关` workflow 为了 release trains. (#63001) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: iOS: pin release versioning to an explicit CalVer in `apps/ios/version.json`, keep TestFlight iteration on the same short version until maintainers intentionally promote the next gateway version, and add the documented `pnpm ios:version:pin -- --from-gateway` workflow for release trains. (#63001) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 浏览器/安全: re-run blocked-destination safety checks 之后 interaction-driven main-frame navigations 从 click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, 和 batched action flows, so 浏览器 interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine 当 they land 在 forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/security: re-run blocked-destination safety checks after interaction-driven main-frame navigations from click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, and batched action flows, so browser interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine when they land on forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 安全/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus 浏览器-control override 和 skip-server env vars 从 untrusted workspace `.env` files, 和 reject unsafe URL-style 浏览器 control override specifiers 之前 lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Security/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus browser-control override and skip-server env vars from untrusted workspace `.env` files, and reject unsafe URL-style browser control override specifiers before lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, 和 `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events 和 sanitize node-provided 命令/output/reason text 之前 enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content 进入 later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, and `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events and sanitize node-provided command/output/reason text before enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content into later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 插件/onboarding 认证 choices: 防止 untrusted workspace 插件 从 colliding 使用 bundled provider 认证-choice ids 期间 non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out 的 untrusted workspace 插件 handlers unless those 插件 are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding auth choices: prevent untrusted workspace plugins from colliding with bundled provider auth-choice ids during non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out of untrusted workspace plugin handlers unless those plugins are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 安全/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` 为了 the CRLF 命令-injection 修复 和 bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` 在 production resolution paths.
changes.rawTitle: Security/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` for the CRLF command-injection fix and bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` in production resolution paths.

changes.title: Android/pairing: clear stale setup-code 认证 在 new QR scans, bootstrap operator 和 node sessions 从 fresh pairing, prefer stored device tokens 之后 bootstrap handoff, 和 pause pairing auto-重试 while the app is backgrounded so scan-once Android pairing recovers reliably 重新. (#63199) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Android/pairing: clear stale setup-code auth on new QR scans, bootstrap operator and node sessions from fresh pairing, prefer stored device tokens after bootstrap handoff, and pause pairing auto-retry while the app is backgrounded so scan-once Android pairing recovers reliably again. (#63199) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Matrix/网关: wait 为了 Matrix sync readiness 之前 marking startup successful, keep Matrix background handler failures contained, 和 route fatal Matrix sync stops through channel-level restart handling 而不是 crashing the whole 网关. (#62779) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/gateway: wait for Matrix sync readiness before marking startup successful, keep Matrix background handler failures contained, and route fatal Matrix sync stops through channel-level restart handling instead of crashing the whole gateway. (#62779) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Slack/media: 保留 bearer 认证 across same-origin `files.Slack.com` redirects while still stripping it 在 cross-origin Slack CDN hops, so `url_private_download` image attachments load 重新. (#62960) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/media: preserve bearer auth across same-origin `files.slack.com` redirects while still stripping it on cross-origin Slack CDN hops, so `url_private_download` image attachments load again. (#62960) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Reply/诊断工具: use the active runtime snapshot 为了 queued reply runs, 解决 reply-run SecretRefs 之前 preflight helpers touch 配置, surface 网关 OAuth认证 reauth failures to users, 和 make `openclaw 诊断工具` call out exact reauth commands. (#62693, #63217) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Reply/doctor: use the active runtime snapshot for queued reply runs, resolve reply-run SecretRefs before preflight helpers touch config, surface gateway OAuth reauth failures to users, and make `openclaw doctor` call out exact reauth commands. (#62693, #63217) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Control 界面: guard stale session-history reloads 期间 fast session switches so the selected session 和 rendered transcript stay 在 sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: guard stale session-history reloads during fast session switches so the selected session and rendered transcript stay in sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 网关/chat: suppress exact 和 streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates 和 history sanitization so internal Agent-to-Agent control tokens no longer leak 进入 user-facing 网关 chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: suppress exact and streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates and history sanitization so internal agent-to-agent control tokens no longer leak into user-facing gateway chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.

changes.title: Auto-reply/NO_REPLY: strip glued leading `NO_REPLY` tokens 之前 reply normalization 和 ACP-visible streaming so silent sentinel text no longer leaks 进入 user-visible replies while preserving substantive `NO_REPLY ...` text. Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/NO_REPLY: strip glued leading `NO_REPLY` tokens before reply normalization and ACP-visible streaming so silent sentinel text no longer leaks into user-visible replies while preserving substantive `NO_REPLY ...` text. Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: Sessions/routing: 保留 established external routes 在 inter-session announce traffic so `sessions_send` follow-ups do not steal delivery 从 Telegram, Discord, 或 other external channels. (#58013) Thanks @duqaXxX.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/routing: preserve established external routes on inter-session announce traffic so `sessions_send` follow-ups do not steal delivery from Telegram, Discord, or other external channels. (#58013) Thanks @duqaXxX.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned model overrides on `/reset` and `/new` while still preserving explicit user model selections, including legacy sessions created before override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.

changes.rawTitle: Slack/ACP: treat Slack ACP block replies as visible delivered output so OpenClaw stops re-sending the final fallback text after Slack already rendered the reply. (#62858) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.rawTitle: Slack/partial streaming: key turn-local dedupe by dispatch kind and keep the final fallback reply path active when preview finalization fails so stale preview text cannot suppress the actual final answer. (#62859) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/诊断工具: migrate legacy `channels.matrix.dm.policy: "trusted"` configs back to compatible DM policies 期间 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`, preserving explicit `allowFrom` boundaries as `allowlist` 和 defaulting empty legacy configs to `pairing`. (#62942) Thanks @lukeboyett.

changes.title: npm packaging: mirror bundled channel runtime deps, stage Nostr runtime deps, derive required root mirrors 从 manifests 和 built chunks, 和 test packed release tarballs 不适用 repo `node_modules` so fresh installs fail fast 在 missing 插件 deps 而不是 crashing at runtime. items.title: Slack/media: 保留 bearer 认证 across same-origin `files.Slack.com` redirects while still stripping it 在 cross-origin Slack CDN hops, so `url_private_download` image attachments load 重新. (#62960) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Slack/media: preserve bearer auth across same-origin `files.slack.com` redirects while still stripping it on cross-origin Slack CDN hops, so `url_private_download` image attachments load again. (#62960) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Sessions/routing: 保留 established external routes 在 inter-session announce traffic so `sessions_send` follow-ups do not steal delivery 从 Telegram, Discord, 或 other external channels. (#58013) Thanks @duqaXxX.
items.rawTitle: Sessions/routing: preserve established external routes on inter-session announce traffic so `sessions_send` follow-ups do not steal delivery from Telegram, Discord, or other external channels. (#58013) Thanks @duqaXxX.

items.title: Slack/ACP: treat Slack ACP block replies as visible delivered output so OpenClaw stops re-sending the final fallback text 之后 Slack already rendered the reply. (#62858) Thanks @gumadeiras.
items.rawTitle: Slack/ACP: treat Slack ACP block replies as visible delivered output so OpenClaw stops re-sending the final fallback text after Slack already rendered the reply. (#62858) Thanks @gumadeiras.

items.title: Slack/partial streaming: 密钥 turn-local dedupe 通过 dispatch kind 和 keep the final fallback reply 路径 active 当 preview finalization fails so stale preview text cannot suppress the actual final answer. (#62859) Thanks @gumadeiras.
items.rawTitle: Slack/partial streaming: key turn-local dedupe by dispatch kind and keep the final fallback reply path active when preview finalization fails so stale preview text cannot suppress the actual final answer. (#62859) Thanks @gumadeiras.

items.title: Matrix/诊断工具: migrate legacy `channels.matrix.dm.policy: "trusted"` configs back to compatible DM policies 期间 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`, preserving explicit `allowFrom` boundaries as `allowlist` 和 defaulting empty legacy configs to `pairing`. (#62942) Thanks @lukeboyett.
items.rawTitle: Matrix/doctor: migrate legacy `channels.matrix.dm.policy: "trusted"` configs back to compatible DM policies during `openclaw doctor --fix`, preserving explicit `allowFrom` boundaries as `allowlist` and defaulting empty legacy configs to `pairing`. (#62942) Thanks @lukeboyett.

items.title: npm packaging: mirror bundled channel runtime deps, stage Nostr runtime deps, derive required root mirrors 从 manifests 和 built chunks, 和 test packed release tarballs 不适用 repo `node_modules` so fresh installs fail fast 在 missing 插件 deps 而不是 crashing at runtime. (#63065) Thanks @scoootscooob.
items.rawTitle: npm packaging: mirror bundled channel runtime deps, stage Nostr runtime deps, derive required root mirrors from manifests and built chunks, and test packed release tarballs without repo `node_modules` so fresh installs fail fast on missing plugin deps instead of crashing at runtime. (#63065) Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.title: 插件 SDK: export the channel 插件 base 和 web-search 配置 contract through the public package so 插件 can use them 不适用 private imports.
items.rawTitle: Plugin SDK: export the channel plugin base and web-search config contract through the public package so plugins can use them without private imports.

items.title: QA/lab: 添加 character-vibes evaluation reports 使用 模型 selection 和 parallel runs so live QA can compare candidate behavior faster.
items.rawTitle: QA/lab: add character-vibes evaluation reports with model selection and parallel runs so live QA can compare candidate behavior faster.

items.title: Android/pairing: clear stale setup-code 认证 在 new QR scans, bootstrap operator 和 node sessions 从 fresh pairing, prefer stored device tokens 之后 bootstrap handoff, 和 pause pairing auto-重试 while the app is backgrounded so scan-once Android pairing recovers reliably 重新. (#63199) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Android/pairing: clear stale setup-code auth on new QR scans, bootstrap operator and node sessions from fresh pairing, prefer stored device tokens after bootstrap handoff, and pause pairing auto-retry while the app is backgrounded so scan-once Android pairing recovers reliably again. (#63199) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: Reply/诊断工具: use the active runtime snapshot 为了 queued reply runs, 解决 reply-run SecretRefs 之前 preflight helpers touch 配置, surface 网关 OAuth认证 reauth failures to users, 和 make `openclaw 诊断工具` call out exact reauth commands. (#62693, #63217) Thanks @mbelinky.
items.rawTitle: Reply/doctor: use the active runtime snapshot for queued reply runs, resolve reply-run SecretRefs before preflight helpers touch config, surface gateway OAuth reauth failures to users, and make `openclaw doctor` call out exact reauth commands. (#62693, #63217) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: Auto-reply/NO_REPLY: strip glued leading `NO_REPLY` tokens 之前 reply normalization 和 ACP-visible streaming so silent sentinel text no longer leaks 进入 user-visible replies while preserving substantive `NO_REPLY ...` text. Thanks @frankekn.
items.rawTitle: Auto-reply/NO_REPLY: strip glued leading `NO_REPLY` tokens before reply normalization and ACP-visible streaming so silent sentinel text no longer leaks into user-visible replies while preserving substantive `NO_REPLY ...` text. Thanks @frankekn.

items.title: Providers/Ollama: 允许 Ollama 模型 using the native `API: "ollama"` 路径 to optionally display thinking output 当 `/think` is set to a non-off level. (#62712) Thanks @hoyyeva.
items.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: allow Ollama models using the native `api: "ollama"` path to optionally display thinking output when `/think` is set to a non-off level. (#62712) Thanks @hoyyeva.

items.title: Codex CLI: pass OpenClaw's system prompt through Codex's `model_instructions_file` 配置 override so fresh Codex CLI sessions receive the same prompt guidance as Claude CLI sessions.
items.rawTitle: Codex CLI: pass OpenClaw's system prompt through Codex's `model_instructions_file` config override so fresh Codex CLI sessions receive the same prompt guidance as Claude CLI sessions.

items.title: 内存/dreaming: accept embedded heartbeat trigger tokens so light 和 REM dreaming still run 当 runtime wrappers include extra heartbeat text.
items.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: accept embedded heartbeat trigger tokens so light and REM dreaming still run when runtime wrappers include extra heartbeat text.

items.title: Control 界面/模型: 保留 provider-qualified refs 为了 OpenRouter catalog 模型 whose ids already contain slashes so picker selections submit allowlist-compatible 模型 refs 而不是 dropping the `OpenRouter/` prefix. (#63416) Thanks @sallyom.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/models: preserve provider-qualified refs for OpenRouter catalog models whose ids already contain slashes so picker selections submit allowlist-compatible model refs instead of dropping the `openrouter/` prefix. (#63416) Thanks @sallyom.

items.title: 插件/provider-认证: let provider manifests declare `providerAuthAliases` so provider variants can share env vars, 认证 profiles, 配置-backed 认证, 和 API-密钥 onboarding choices 不适用 core-specific wiring.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/provider-auth: let provider manifests declare `providerAuthAliases` so provider variants can share env vars, auth profiles, config-backed auth, and API-key onboarding choices without core-specific wiring.

items.title: iOS: pin release versioning to an explicit CalVer 在 `apps/ios/version.json`, keep TestFlight iteration 在 the same short version until maintainers intentionally promote the next 网关 version, 和 添加 the documented `pnpm ios:version:pin -- --从-网关` workflow 为了 release trains. (#63001) Thanks @ngutman.
items.rawTitle: iOS: pin release versioning to an explicit CalVer in `apps/ios/version.json`, keep TestFlight iteration on the same short version until maintainers intentionally promote the next gateway version, and add the documented `pnpm ios:version:pin -- --from-gateway` workflow for release trains. (#63001) Thanks @ngutman.

items.title: 插件/onboarding 认证 choices: 防止 untrusted workspace 插件 从 colliding 使用 bundled provider 认证-choice ids 期间 non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out 的 untrusted workspace 插件 handlers unless those 插件 are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding auth choices: prevent untrusted workspace plugins from colliding with bundled provider auth-choice ids during non-interactive onboarding, so bundled provider setup keeps operator secrets out of untrusted workspace plugin handlers unless those plugins are explicitly trusted. (#62368) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: 网关/chat: suppress exact 和 streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates 和 history sanitization so internal Agent-to-Agent control tokens no longer leak 进入 user-facing 网关 chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: suppress exact and streamed `ANNOUNCE_SKIP` / `REPLY_SKIP` control replies across live chat updates and history sanitization so internal agent-to-agent control tokens no longer leak into user-facing gateway chat surfaces. (#51739) Thanks @Pinghuachiu.

items.title: 网关/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned 模型 overrides 在 `/reset` 和 `/new` while still preserving explicit user 模型 selections, including legacy sessions created 之前 override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: clear auto-fallback-pinned model overrides on `/reset` and `/new` while still preserving explicit user model selections, including legacy sessions created before override-source tracking existed. (#63155) Thanks @frankekn.

items.title: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` 在 OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, 和 compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` on OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, and compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.

items.title: 认证/profiles: persist explicit 认证-profile upserts directly 和 skip external CLI sync 为了 local writes so profile changes are saved 不适用 stale external credential state.
items.rawTitle: Auth/profiles: persist explicit auth-profile upserts directly and skip external CLI sync for local writes so profile changes are saved without stale external credential state.

items.title: 浏览器/安全: re-run blocked-destination safety checks 之后 interaction-driven main-frame navigations 从 click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, 和 batched action flows, so 浏览器 interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine 当 they land 在 forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Browser/security: re-run blocked-destination safety checks after interaction-driven main-frame navigations from click, evaluate, hook-triggered click, and batched action flows, so browser interactions cannot bypass the SSRF quarantine when they land on forbidden URLs. (#63226) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 安全/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus 浏览器-control override 和 skip-server env vars 从 untrusted workspace `.env` files, 和 reject unsafe URL-style 浏览器 control override specifiers 之前 lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Security/dotenv: block runtime-control env vars plus browser-control override and skip-server env vars from untrusted workspace `.env` files, and reject unsafe URL-style browser control override specifiers before lazy loading. (#62660, #62663) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 网关/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, 和 `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events 和 sanitize node-provided 命令/output/reason text 之前 enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content 进入 later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/node exec events: mark remote node `exec.started`, `exec.finished`, and `exec.denied` summaries as untrusted system events and sanitize node-provided command/output/reason text before enqueueing them, so remote node output cannot inject trusted `System:` content into later turns. (#62659) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

items.title: 安全/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` 为了 the CRLF 命令-injection 修复 和 bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` 在 production resolution paths.
items.rawTitle: Security/dependency audit: force `basic-ftp` to `5.2.1` for the CRLF command-injection fix and bump Hono plus `@hono/node-server` in production resolution paths.

items.title: 内存/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, 和 diary action classification 通过 preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing 或 symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings 在 网关 backfills, 和 tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.
items.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, and diary action classification by preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing or symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings in gateway backfills, and tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: Android/manual connect: 允许 blank port input only 为了 TLS manual 网关 endpoints so standard HTTPS Tailscale hosts default to `443` 不适用 静默地 changing cleartext manual connects. (#63134) Thanks @Tyler-RNG.
items.rawTitle: Android/manual connect: allow blank port input only for TLS manual gateway endpoints so standard HTTPS Tailscale hosts default to `443` without silently changing cleartext manual connects. (#63134) Thanks @Tyler-RNG.

items.title: Control 界面: guard stale session-history reloads 期间 fast session switches so the selected session 和 rendered transcript stay 在 sync. (#62975) Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.title: QA/live 认证: fail fast 当 live QA scenarios hit classified 认证 或 runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, 和 sanitize missing-密钥 guidance so 网关 认证 problems surface as actionable errors 而不是 timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.
items.rawTitle: QA/live auth: fail fast when live QA scenarios hit classified auth or runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, and sanitize missing-key guidance so gateway auth problems surface as actionable errors instead of timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.title: Agent/timeouts: make the LLM idle 超时 inherit `Agent.defaults.timeoutSeconds` 当 configured, 禁用 the unconfigured idle watchdog 为了 cron runs, 和 point idle-超时 errors at `Agent.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.
items.rawTitle: Agents/timeouts: make the LLM idle timeout inherit `agents.defaults.timeoutSeconds` when configured, disable the unconfigured idle watchdog for cron runs, and point idle-timeout errors at `agents.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.

items.title: Agent/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing 和 `1113` as 认证, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors 停止 falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.
items.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing and `1113` as auth, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors stop falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.

items.title: QQBot/media-tags: 支持 HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes 在 attributes, 和 self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are 正确地 parsed 和 normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.
items.rawTitle: QQBot/media-tags: support HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes in attributes, and self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are correctly parsed and normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.

items.title: 插件/contracts: keep test-only helpers out 的 production contract barrels, load shared contract harnesses through bundled test surfaces, 和 harden guardrails so indirect re-exports 和 canonical `*.test.ts` files stay blocked. (#63311) Thanks @altaywtf.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/contracts: keep test-only helpers out of production contract barrels, load shared contract harnesses through bundled test surfaces, and harden guardrails so indirect re-exports and canonical `*.test.ts` files stay blocked. (#63311) Thanks @altaywtf.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: 添加 a grounded REM backfill lane 使用 historical `rem-harness --路径`, diary commit/reset flows, cleaner durable-fact extraction, 和 live short-term promotion integration so old daily notes can replay 进入 Dreams 和 durable 内存 不适用 a second 内存 stack. Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: npm packaging: mirror bundled channel runtime deps, stage Nostr runtime deps, derive required root mirrors 从 manifests 和 built chunks, 和 test packed release tarballs 不适用 repo `node_modules` so fresh installs fail fast 在 missing 插件 deps 而不是 crashing at runtime. (#63065) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: npm packaging: mirror bundled channel runtime deps, stage Nostr runtime deps, derive required root mirrors from manifests and built chunks, and test packed release tarballs without repo `node_modules` so fresh installs fail fast on missing plugin deps instead of crashing at runtime. (#63065) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: QA/live 认证: fail fast 当 live QA scenarios hit classified 认证 或 runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, 和 sanitize missing-密钥 guidance so 网关 认证 problems surface as actionable errors 而不是 timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: QA/live auth: fail fast when live QA scenarios hit classified auth or runtime failure replies, including raw scenario wait paths, and sanitize missing-key guidance so gateway auth problems surface as actionable errors instead of timeouts. (#63333) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` 在 OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, 和 compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: default missing reasoning effort to `high` on OpenAI Responses, WebSocket, and compatible completions transports, while still honoring explicit per-run reasoning levels.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: 允许 Ollama 模型 using the native `API: "ollama"` 路径 to optionally display thinking output 当 `/think` is set to a non-off level. (#62712) Thanks @hoyyeva.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: allow Ollama models using the native `api: "ollama"` path to optionally display thinking output when `/think` is set to a non-off level. (#62712) Thanks @hoyyeva.

changes.title: Codex CLI: pass OpenClaw's system prompt through Codex's `model_instructions_file` 配置 override so fresh Codex CLI sessions receive the same prompt guidance as Claude CLI sessions.

changes.title: 认证/profiles: persist explicit 认证-profile upserts directly 和 skip external CLI sync 为了 local writes so profile changes are saved 不适用 stale external credential state.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/profiles: persist explicit auth-profile upserts directly and skip external CLI sync for local writes so profile changes are saved without stale external credential state.

changes.title: Agent/timeouts: make the LLM idle 超时 inherit `Agent.defaults.timeoutSeconds` 当 configured, 禁用 the unconfigured idle watchdog 为了 cron runs, 和 point idle-超时 errors at `Agent.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/timeouts: make the LLM idle timeout inherit `agents.defaults.timeoutSeconds` when configured, disable the unconfigured idle watchdog for cron runs, and point idle-timeout errors at `agents.defaults.llm.idleTimeoutSeconds`. Thanks @drvoss.

changes.title: Agent/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing 和 `1113` as 认证, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors 停止 falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify Z.ai vendor code `1311` as billing and `1113` as auth, including long wrapped `1311` payloads, so these errors stop falling through to generic failover handling. (#49552) Thanks @1bcMax.

changes.title: QQBot/media-tags: 支持 HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes 在 attributes, 和 self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are 正确地 parsed 和 normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot/media-tags: support HTML entity-encoded angle brackets (`<`/`>`), URL slashes in attributes, and self-closing media tags so upstream `<qqimg>` payloads are correctly parsed and normalized. (#60493) Thanks @ylc0919.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, 和 diary action classification 通过 preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing 或 symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings 在 网关 backfills, 和 tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: harden grounded backfill inputs, diary writes, status payloads, and diary action classification by preserving source-day labels, rejecting missing or symlinked targets cleanly, normalizing diary headings in gateway backfills, and tightening claim splitting plus diary source metadata. changes.rawTitle: iOS/Watch exec approvals: keep Apple Watch review and approval recovery working while the iPhone is locked or backgrounded, including reconnect recovery, pending approval persistence, notification cleanup, and APNs-backed watch refresh recovery. (#61757) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: Agent/context overflow: combine oversized 和 aggregate 工具-result recovery 在 one pass 和 restore a total-context overflow backstop so recoverable sessions 重试 而不是 failing early. (#61651) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/context overflow: combine oversized and aggregate tool-result recovery in one pass and restore a total-context overflow backstop so recoverable sessions retry instead of failing early. (#61651) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: 认证/OpenAI Codex OAuth认证: reload fresh 在-disk credentials inside the locked refresh 路径 和 重试 once 之后 `refresh_token_reused` rotates only the stored refresh 令牌, so relogin/restart recovery stops getting stuck 在 stale cached 认证 state. Thanks @owen-ever.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/OpenAI Codex OAuth: reload fresh on-disk credentials inside the locked refresh path and retry once after `refresh_token_reused` rotates only the stored refresh token, so relogin/restart recovery stops getting stuck on stale cached auth state. Thanks @owen-ever.

changes.title: 认证/OpenAI Codex OAuth认证: keep native `/模型 ...@profile` selections 在 the target session 和 honor explicit user-locked 认证 profiles even 当 per-Agent 认证 order excludes them. (#62744) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/OpenAI Codex OAuth: keep native `/model ...@profile` selections on the target session and honor explicit user-locked auth profiles even when per-agent auth order excludes them. (#62744) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Agent/exec: 保留 explicit `host=node` routing under elevated defaults 当 `tools.exec.host=auto`, fail loud 在 invalid elevated cross-host overrides, 和 keep `strictInlineEval` commands blocked 之后 approval timeouts 而不是 falling through to automatic execution. (#61739) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: Nodes/exec approvals: keep `host=node` POSIX transport shell wrappers (`/bin/sh -lc ...`) aligned 使用 inner-命令 allowlist analysis so allowlisted scripts 停止 prompting unnecessarily, while Windows `cmd.exe` wrapper runs stay approval-gated. (#62401) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Nodes/exec approvals: keep `host=node` POSIX transport shell wrappers (`/bin/sh -lc ...`) aligned with inner-command allowlist analysis so allowlisted scripts stop prompting unnecessarily, while Windows `cmd.exe` wrapper runs stay approval-gated. (#62401) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: Nodes/exec approvals: keep Windows `cmd.exe /c` wrapper runs approval-gated even 当 `env` carriers, including env-assignment carriers, wrap the shell invocation. (#62439) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Nodes/exec approvals: keep Windows `cmd.exe /c` wrapper runs approval-gated even when `env` carriers, including env-assignment carriers, wrap the shell invocation. (#62439) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: 网关 工具/exec 配置: block 模型-facing `网关 配置.apply` 和 `配置.patch` writes 从 changing exec approval paths such as `safeBins`, `safeBinProfiles`, `safeBinTrustedDirs`, 和 `strictInlineEval`, while still allowing unchanged structured values through. (#62001) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway tool/exec config: block model-facing `gateway config.apply` and `config.patch` writes from changing exec approval paths such as `safeBins`, `safeBinProfiles`, `safeBinTrustedDirs`, and `strictInlineEval`, while still allowing unchanged structured values through. (#62001) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Host exec/env sanitization: block dangerous Java, Rust, Cargo, Git, Kubernetes, cloud credential, 配置-路径, 和 Helm env overrides so host-run tools cannot be redirected to attacker-chosen code, 配置, credentials, 或 repository state. (#59119, #62002, #62291) Thanks @eleqtrizit 和 contributors.
changes.rawTitle: Host exec/env sanitization: block dangerous Java, Rust, Cargo, Git, Kubernetes, cloud credential, config-path, and Helm env overrides so host-run tools cannot be redirected to attacker-chosen code, config, credentials, or repository state. (#59119, #62002, #62291) Thanks @eleqtrizit and contributors.

changes.title: Commands/allowlist: require owner authorization 为了 `/allowlist 添加` 和 `/allowlist 移除` 之前 channel resolution, so non-owner 但是 命令-authorized senders can no longer persistently rewrite allowlist policy state. (#62383) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Commands/allowlist: require owner authorization for `/allowlist add` and `/allowlist remove` before channel resolution, so non-owner but command-authorized senders can no longer persistently rewrite allowlist policy state. (#62383) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 飞书/docx uploads: honor `tools.fs.workspaceOnly` 为了 local `upload_file` 和 `upload_image` paths 通过 forwarding workspace-constrained `localRoots` 进入 the media loader, so docx uploads can no longer read host-local files outside the workspace 当 workspace-only mode is active. (#62369) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/docx uploads: honor `tools.fs.workspaceOnly` for local `upload_file` and `upload_image` paths by forwarding workspace-constrained `localRoots` into the media loader, so docx uploads can no longer read host-local files outside the workspace when workspace-only mode is active. (#62369) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Network/fetch guard: drop request bodies 和 body-describing headers 在 cross-origin `307` 和 `308` redirects 通过 default, so attacker-controlled redirect hops cannot receive secret-bearing POST payloads 从 SSRF-guarded fetch flows unless a caller explicitly opts 在. (#62357) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Network/fetch guard: drop request bodies and body-describing headers on cross-origin `307` and `308` redirects by default, so attacker-controlled redirect hops cannot receive secret-bearing POST payloads from SSRF-guarded fetch flows unless a caller explicitly opts in. (#62357) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 浏览器/SSRF: treat main-frame `document` redirect hops as navigations even 当 Playwright does not flag them as `isNavigationRequest()`, so strict private-network blocking still stops forbidden redirect pivots 之前 the 浏览器 reaches the internal target. (#62355) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/SSRF: treat main-frame `document` redirect hops as navigations even when Playwright does not flag them as `isNavigationRequest()`, so strict private-network blocking still stops forbidden redirect pivots before the browser reaches the internal target. (#62355) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 浏览器/node invoke: block persistent 浏览器 profile create, reset, 和 delete mutations through `浏览器.代理` 在 both 网关-forwarded `node.invoke` 和 the node-host 代理 路径, even 当 no profile allowlist is configured. (#60489)
changes.rawTitle: Browser/node invoke: block persistent browser profile create, reset, and delete mutations through `browser.proxy` on both gateway-forwarded `node.invoke` and the node-host proxy path, even when no profile allowlist is configured. (#60489)

changes.title: 网关/node pairing: require a fresh pairing request 当 a previously paired node reconnects 使用 additional declared commands, 和 keep the live session pinned to the earlier approved 命令 set until the upgrade is approved. (#62658) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/node pairing: require a fresh pairing request when a previously paired node reconnects with additional declared commands, and keep the live session pinned to the earlier approved command set until the upgrade is approved. (#62658) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/认证: invalidate existing shared-令牌 和 password WebSocket sessions 当 the configured secret rotates, so stale authenticated sockets cannot stay attached 之后 令牌 或 password changes. (#62350) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: invalidate existing shared-token and password WebSocket sessions when the configured secret rotates, so stale authenticated sockets cannot stay attached after token or password changes. (#62350) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: MS Teams/安全: validate file-consent upload URLs against HTTPS, Microsoft/SharePoint host allowlists, 和 private-IP DNS checks 之前 uploading attachments, blocking SSRF-style consent-upload abuse. (#23596)
changes.rawTitle: MS Teams/security: validate file-consent upload URLs against HTTPS, Microsoft/SharePoint host allowlists, and private-IP DNS checks before uploading attachments, blocking SSRF-style consent-upload abuse. (#23596)

changes.title: Media/base64 decode guards: enforce byte limits 之前 decoding missed base64-backed Teams, Signal, QQ Bot, 和 image-工具 payloads so oversized inbound media 和 data URLs no longer bypass pre-decode size checks. (#62007) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Media/base64 decode guards: enforce byte limits before decoding missed base64-backed Teams, Signal, QQ Bot, and image-tool payloads so oversized inbound media and data URLs no longer bypass pre-decode size checks. (#62007) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Runtime event trust: mark background `notifyOnExit` summaries, ACP parent-stream relays, 和 wake-hook payloads as untrusted system events so lower-trust runtime output no longer re-enters later turns as trusted `System:` text. (#62003)
changes.rawTitle: Runtime event trust: mark background `notifyOnExit` summaries, ACP parent-stream relays, and wake-hook payloads as untrusted system events so lower-trust runtime output no longer re-enters later turns as trusted `System:` text. (#62003)

changes.title: Auto-reply/media: 允许 managed generated-media `MEDIA:` paths 从 normal reply text 重新 while still blocking arbitrary host-local media 和 document paths, so generated media keep delivering 不适用 reopening host-路径 injection holes.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/media: allow managed generated-media `MEDIA:` paths from normal reply text again while still blocking arbitrary host-local media and document paths, so generated media keep delivering without reopening host-path injection holes.

changes.title: 网关/status 和 containers: auto-bind to `0.0.0.0` inside Docker 和 Podman environments, 和 probe local TLS gateways over `wss://` 使用 self-signed fingerprint forwarding so container startup 和 loopback TLS status checks work 重新. (#61818, #61935) Thanks @openperf 和 contributors.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/status and containers: auto-bind to `0.0.0.0` inside Docker and Podman environments, and probe local TLS gateways over `wss://` with self-signed fingerprint forwarding so container startup and loopback TLS status checks work again. (#61818, #61935) Thanks @openperf and contributors.

changes.title: 网关/OpenAI-compatible HTTP: abort 在-flight `/v1/chat/completions` 和 `/v1/responses` turns 当 clients disconnect so abandoned HTTP requests 停止 wasting Agent runtime. (#54388) Thanks @Lellansin.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/OpenAI-compatible HTTP: abort in-flight `/v1/chat/completions` and `/v1/responses` turns when clients disconnect so abandoned HTTP requests stop wasting agent runtime. (#54388) Thanks @Lellansin.

changes.title: macOS/网关 version: strip trailing commit metadata 从 CLI version output 之前 semver parsing so the Mac app recognizes installed 网关 versions like `OpenClaw 2026.4.2 (d74a122)` 重新. (#61111) Thanks @oliviareid-svg.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/gateway version: strip trailing commit metadata from CLI version output before semver parsing so the Mac app recognizes installed gateway versions like `OpenClaw 2026.4.2 (d74a122)` again. (#61111) Thanks @oliviareid-svg.

changes.title: Sessions/模型 selection: 解决 the explicitly selected session 模型 separately 从 runtime fallback resolution so session status 和 live 模型 switching stay aligned 使用 the chosen 模型.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/model selection: resolve the explicitly selected session model separately from runtime fallback resolution so session status and live model switching stay aligned with the chosen model.

changes.title: Discord/ACP bindings: canonicalize DM conversation identity across inbound messages, component interactions, native commands, 和 current-conversation binding resolution so `--bind here` 在 Discord DMs keeps routing follow-up replies to the bound Agent 而不是 falling back to the default Agent.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/ACP bindings: canonicalize DM conversation identity across inbound messages, component interactions, native commands, and current-conversation binding resolution so `--bind here` in Discord DMs keeps routing follow-up replies to the bound agent instead of falling back to the default agent.

changes.title: Discord: recover forwarded referenced message text 和 attachments 当 snapshots are missing, use `ws://` 重新 为了 网关 monitor sockets, 停止 forcing a hardcoded temperature 为了 Codex-backed auto-thread titles, 和 harden 语音 receive recovery so rapid speaker restarts keep their next utterance. (#41536, #61670) Thanks @artwalker 和 contributors.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: recover forwarded referenced message text and attachments when snapshots are missing, use `ws://` again for gateway monitor sockets, stop forcing a hardcoded temperature for Codex-backed auto-thread titles, and harden voice receive recovery so rapid speaker restarts keep their next utterance. (#41536, #61670) Thanks @artwalker and contributors.

changes.title: Slack/thread mentions: 添加 `channels.Slack.thread.requireExplicitMention` so Slack channels that already require mentions can also require explicit `@bot` mentions inside bot-participated threads. (#58276) Thanks @praktika-engineer.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/thread mentions: add `channels.slack.thread.requireExplicitMention` so Slack channels that already require mentions can also require explicit `@bot` mentions inside bot-participated threads. (#58276) Thanks @praktika-engineer.

changes.title: Slack/threading: keep legacy thread stickiness 为了 real replies 当 older callers omit `isThreadReply`, while still honoring `replyToMode` 为了 Slack's auto-created top-level `thread_ts`. (#61835) Thanks @kaonash.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/threading: keep legacy thread stickiness for real replies when older callers omit `isThreadReply`, while still honoring `replyToMode` for Slack's auto-created top-level `thread_ts`. (#61835) Thanks @kaonash.

changes.title: Slack/media: keep attachment downloads 在 the SSRF-guarded dispatcher 路径 so Slack media fetching works 在 Node 22 不适用 dropping pinned transport enforcement. (#62239) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/media: keep attachment downloads on the SSRF-guarded dispatcher path so Slack media fetching works on Node 22 without dropping pinned transport enforcement. (#62239) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Matrix/onboarding: 添加 an invite auto-join setup step 使用 explicit off warnings 和 strict stable-target validation so new Matrix accounts 停止 静默地 ignoring invited rooms 和 fresh DM-style invites unless operators opt 在. (#62168) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/onboarding: add an invite auto-join setup step with explicit off warnings and strict stable-target validation so new Matrix accounts stop silently ignoring invited rooms and fresh DM-style invites unless operators opt in. (#62168) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix/formatting: 保留 multi-paragraph 和 loose-list rendering 在 Element so numbered 和 bulleted Markdown keeps their content attached to the correct list item. (#60997) Thanks @gucasbrg.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/formatting: preserve multi-paragraph and loose-list rendering in Element so numbered and bulleted Markdown keeps their content attached to the correct list item. (#60997) Thanks @gucasbrg.

changes.title: Telegram/诊断工具: keep top-level access-control fallback 在 place 期间 multi-account normalization while still promoting legacy default 认证 进入 `accounts.default`, so existing named bots keep inherited allowlists 不适用 dropping the legacy default bot. (#62263) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 插件/loaders: centralize bundled `dist/**` Jiti native-load policy 和 keep channel, public-surface, facade, 和 配置-metadata loader seams off native Jiti 在 Windows so onboarding 和 configure flows 停止 tripping `ERR_UNSUPPORTED_ESM_URL_SCHEME`. (#62286) Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code.

(#62286) Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code.

changes.title: 插件/channels: keep bundled channel artifact 和 secret-contract loading stable under lazy loading, 保留 插件-schema defaults 期间 install, 和 修复 Windows `file://` plus native-Jiti 插件 loader paths so onboarding, 诊断工具, `openclaw secret`, 和 bundled 插件 installs work 重新. (#61832, #61836, #61853, #61856) Thanks @Zeesejo 和 contributors.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/channels: keep bundled channel artifact and secret-contract loading stable under lazy loading, preserve plugin-schema defaults during install, and fix Windows `file://` plus native-Jiti plugin loader paths so onboarding, doctor, `openclaw secret`, and bundled plugin installs work again. (#61832, #61836, #61853, #61856) Thanks @Zeesejo and contributors.

changes.title: 插件/ClawHub: verify downloaded 插件 archives against version metadata SHA-256, fail closed 当 archive integrity metadata is missing 或 malformed, 和 tighten fallback ZIP verification so 插件 installs cannot proceed 在 mismatched 或 incomplete ClawHub package metadata. (#60517) Thanks @mappel-nv.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: verify downloaded plugin archives against version metadata SHA-256, fail closed when archive integrity metadata is missing or malformed, and tighten fallback ZIP verification so plugin installs cannot proceed on mismatched or incomplete ClawHub package metadata. (#60517) Thanks @mappel-nv.

changes.title: 插件/provider hooks: 停止 recursive provider snapshot loads 从 overflowing the stack 期间 插件 initialization, while still preserving cached nested provider-hook results. (#61922, #61938, #61946, #61951)
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/provider hooks: stop recursive provider snapshot loads from overflowing the stack during plugin initialization, while still preserving cached nested provider-hook results. (#61922, #61938, #61946, #61951)

changes.title: Docker/插件: 停止 forcing bundled 插件 discovery to `/app/extensions` 在 runtime images so packaged installs use compiled `dist/extensions` artifacts 重新 和 Node 24 containers do not boot through source-only 插件 entry paths. 修复 #62044. (#62316) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/plugins: stop forcing bundled plugin discovery to `/app/extensions` in runtime images so packaged installs use compiled `dist/extensions` artifacts again and Node 24 containers do not boot through source-only plugin entry paths. Fixes #62044. (#62316) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: honor the selected provider's `baseUrl` 期间 streaming so multi-Ollama setups 停止 routing every stream to the first configured Ollama endpoint. (#61678)
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: honor the selected provider's `baseUrl` during streaming so multi-Ollama setups stop routing every stream to the first configured Ollama endpoint. (#61678)
