changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: stop warning that Ollama could not be reached when discovery only sees empty default local stubs, while still keeping real explicit Ollama overrides loud when the endpoint is unreachable.

changes.title: Providers/xAI: recognize `API.grok.x.ai` as an xAI-native endpoint 重新 和 keep legacy `x_search` 认证 resolution working so older xAI web-search configs continue to load. (#61377) Thanks @jjjojoj.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/xAI: recognize `api.grok.x.ai` as an xAI-native endpoint again and keep legacy `x_search` auth resolution working so older xAI web-search configs continue to load. (#61377) Thanks @jjjojoj.

changes.title: Providers/Mistral: send `reasoning_effort` 为了 `Mistral/Mistral-small-latest` (Mistral Small 4) 使用 thinking-level mapping, 和 mark the catalog entry as reasoning-capable so adjustable reasoning matches Mistral’s Chat Completions API. (#62162) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Mistral: send `reasoning_effort` for `mistral/mistral-small-latest` (Mistral Small 4) with thinking-level mapping, and mark the catalog entry as reasoning-capable so adjustable reasoning matches Mistral’s Chat Completions API. (#62162) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: OpenAI TTS/Groq: send `wav` to Groq-compatible speech endpoints, honor explicit `responseFormat` overrides 在 OpenAI-compatible paths, 和 only mark 语音-note output as 语音-compatible 当 the actual format is `opus`. (#62233) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI TTS/Groq: send `wav` to Groq-compatible speech endpoints, honor explicit `responseFormat` overrides on OpenAI-compatible paths, and only mark voice-note output as voice-compatible when the actual format is `opus`. (#62233) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Tools/web_fetch 和 web_search: 修复 `TypeError: fetch failed` caused 通过 undici 8.0 enabling HTTP/2 通过 default; pinned SSRF-guard dispatchers 现在 explicitly set `allowH2: false` to restore HTTP/1.1 behavior 和 keep the custom DNS-pinning lookup compatible. (#61738, #61777) Thanks @zozo123.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/web_fetch and web_search: fix `TypeError: fetch failed` caused by undici 8.0 enabling HTTP/2 by default; pinned SSRF-guard dispatchers now explicitly set `allowH2: false` to restore HTTP/1.1 behavior and keep the custom DNS-pinning lookup compatible. (#61738, #61777) Thanks @zozo123.

changes.title: Tools/web search/Exa: show Exa Search 在 onboarding 和 configure provider pickers 重新 通过 marking the bundled Exa provider as setup-visible. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/web search/Exa: show Exa Search in onboarding and configure provider pickers again by marking the bundled Exa provider as setup-visible. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存/vector recall: surface explicit warnings 当 `sqlite-vec` is unavailable 或 vector writes are degraded, 和 strip managed Light Sleep 和 REM blocks 之前 daily-note ingestion so 内存 indexing 和 dreaming 停止 reporting false-success 或 re-ingesting staged output. (#61720) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/vector recall: surface explicit warnings when `sqlite-vec` is unavailable or vector writes are degraded, and strip managed Light Sleep and REM blocks before daily-note ingestion so memory indexing and dreaming stop reporting false-success or re-ingesting staged output. changes.rawTitle: QQ Bot/media: route gateway-side attachment and fallback downloads through guarded QQ/Tencent HTTPS fetches so QQ media handling no longer follows arbitrary remote hosts.

changes.rawTitle: Browser/remote CDP: retry the DevTools websocket once after remote browser restarts so healthy remote browser profiles do not fail availability checks during CDP warm-up. (#57397) Thanks @ThanhNguyxn07.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: honor `sessions_spawn(lightContext: true)` 为了 spawned subagent runs 通过 preserving lightweight bootstrap context through the 网关 和 embedded runner 而不是 静默地 falling back to full workspace bootstrap injection. (#62264) Thanks @theSamPadilla.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: honor `sessions_spawn(lightContext: true)` for spawned subagent runs by preserving lightweight bootstrap context through the gateway and embedded runner instead of silently falling back to full workspace bootstrap injection. (#62264) Thanks @theSamPadilla.

changes.title: Cron: load `jobId` 进入 `id` 当 the 在-disk store omits `id`, matching 诊断工具 migration 和 fixing `unknown cron job id` 为了 hand-edited `jobs.json`. (#62246) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: load `jobId` into `id` when the on-disk store omits `id`, matching doctor migration and fixing `unknown cron job id` for hand-edited `jobs.json`. (#62246) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Agent/模型 fallback: classify minimal HTTP 404 API errors (为了 example `404 status code (no body)`) as `model_not_found` so assistant failures throw 进入 the fallback chain 而不是 stopping at the first fallback candidate. (#62119) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/model fallback: classify minimal HTTP 404 API errors (for example `404 status code (no body)`) as `model_not_found` so assistant failures throw into the fallback chain instead of stopping at the first fallback candidate. (#62119) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: BlueBubbles/network: respect explicit private-network opt-out 为了 loopback 和 private `serverUrl` values across account resolution, status probes, monitor startup, 和 attachment downloads, while keeping public-host attachment hostname pinning intact. (#59373) Thanks @jpreagan.
changes.rawTitle: BlueBubbles/network: respect explicit private-network opt-out for loopback and private `serverUrl` values across account resolution, status probes, monitor startup, and attachment downloads, while keeping public-host attachment hostname pinning intact. (#59373) Thanks @jpreagan.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/heartbeat: keep heartbeat runs pinned to the main session so active subagent transcripts are not overwritten by heartbeat status messages. (#61803) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: stop compaction-wait aborts from re-entering prompt failover and replaying completed tool turns. (#62600) Thanks @i-dentifier.

changes.rawTitle: Approvals/runtime: move native approval lifecycle assembly into shared core bootstrap/runtime seams driven by channel capabilities and runtime contexts, and remove the legacy bundled approval fallback wiring. (#62135) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.rawTitle: Security/fetch-guard: stop rejecting operator-configured proxy hostnames against the target-scoped hostname allowlist in SSRF-guarded fetches, restoring proxy-based media downloads for Telegram and other channels. (#62312) Thanks @ademczuk.

changes.rawTitle: Logging: make `logging.level` and `logging.consoleLevel` honor the documented severity threshold ordering again, and keep child loggers inheriting the parent `minLevel`. (#44646) Thanks @zhumengzhu.

items.title: TUI: route `/status` through the shared session-status 命令, keep commentary hidden 在 history, strip raw envelope metadata 从 async 命令 notices, 保留 fallback streaming 之前 per-attempt failures finalize, 和 restore Kitty keyboard state 在 exit 或 fatal crashes. (#49130, #59985, #60043, #61463) Thanks @biefan 和 contributors.

(#49130, #59985, #60043, #61463) Thanks @biefan and contributors.

items.title: MS Teams/安全: validate file-consent upload URLs against HTTPS, Microsoft/SharePoint host allowlists, 和 private-IP DNS checks 之前 uploading attachments, blocking SSRF-style consent-upload abuse. (#23596)
items.rawTitle: MS Teams/security: validate file-consent upload URLs against HTTPS, Microsoft/SharePoint host allowlists, and private-IP DNS checks before uploading attachments, blocking SSRF-style consent-upload abuse. (#23596)

items.title: iOS/Watch exec approvals: keep Apple Watch review 和 approval recovery working while the iPhone is locked 或 backgrounded, including reconnect recovery, pending approval persistence, notification cleanup, 和 APNs-backed watch refresh recovery. (#61757) Thanks @ngutman.
items.rawTitle: iOS/Watch exec approvals: keep Apple Watch review and approval recovery working while the iPhone is locked or backgrounded, including reconnect recovery, pending approval persistence, notification cleanup, and APNs-backed watch refresh recovery. (#61757) Thanks @ngutman.

items.title: Daemon/systemd: keep sudo systemctl calls scoped to the invoking user 当 machine-scoped systemctl fails, while still avoiding machine fallback 为了 permission-denied user bus errors. (#62337) Thanks @Aftabbs.
items.rawTitle: Daemon/systemd: keep sudo systemctl calls scoped to the invoking user when machine-scoped systemctl fails, while still avoiding machine fallback for permission-denied user bus errors. (#62337) Thanks @Aftabbs.

items.title: Nodes/exec approvals: keep `host=node` POSIX transport shell wrappers (`/bin/sh -lc ...`) aligned 使用 inner-命令 allowlist analysis so allowlisted scripts 停止 prompting unnecessarily, while Windows `cmd.exe` wrapper runs stay approval-gated. (#62401) Thanks @ngutman.
items.rawTitle: Nodes/exec approvals: keep `host=node` POSIX transport shell wrappers (`/bin/sh -lc ...`) aligned with inner-command allowlist analysis so allowlisted scripts stop prompting unnecessarily, while Windows `cmd.exe` wrapper runs stay approval-gated. (#62401) Thanks @ngutman.

items.title: Nodes/exec approvals: keep Windows `cmd.exe /c` wrapper runs approval-gated even 当 `env` carriers, including env-assignment carriers, wrap the shell invocation. (#62439) Thanks @ngutman.
items.rawTitle: Nodes/exec approvals: keep Windows `cmd.exe /c` wrapper runs approval-gated even when `env` carriers, including env-assignment carriers, wrap the shell invocation. (#62439) Thanks @ngutman.

items.title: 浏览器/SSRF: treat main-frame `document` redirect hops as navigations even 当 Playwright does not flag them as `isNavigationRequest()`, so strict private-network blocking still stops forbidden redirect pivots 之前 the 浏览器 reaches the internal target. (#62355) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: Browser/SSRF: treat main-frame `document` redirect hops as navigations even when Playwright does not flag them as `isNavigationRequest()`, so strict private-network blocking still stops forbidden redirect pivots before the browser reaches the internal target. (#62355) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: 浏览器/node invoke: block persistent 浏览器 profile create, reset, 和 delete mutations through `浏览器.代理` 在 both 网关-forwarded `node.invoke` 和 the node-host 代理 路径, even 当 no profile allowlist is configured. (#60489)
items.rawTitle: Browser/node invoke: block persistent browser profile create, reset, and delete mutations through `browser.proxy` on both gateway-forwarded `node.invoke` and the node-host proxy path, even when no profile allowlist is configured. (#60489)

items.title: 浏览器/remote CDP: 重试 the DevTools websocket once 之后 remote 浏览器 restarts so healthy remote 浏览器 profiles do not fail availability checks 期间 CDP warm-up. (#57397) Thanks @ThanhNguyxn07.
items.rawTitle: Browser/remote CDP: retry the DevTools websocket once after remote browser restarts so healthy remote browser profiles do not fail availability checks during CDP warm-up. (#57397) Thanks @ThanhNguyxn07.

items.title: Auto-reply/media: 允许 managed generated-media `MEDIA:` paths 从 normal reply text 重新 while still blocking arbitrary host-local media 和 document paths, so generated media keep delivering 不适用 reopening host-路径 injection holes.
items.rawTitle: Auto-reply/media: allow managed generated-media `MEDIA:` paths from normal reply text again while still blocking arbitrary host-local media and document paths, so generated media keep delivering without reopening host-path injection holes.

changes.title: Telegram/reasoning: only create a Telegram reasoning preview lane 当 the session is explicitly `reasoning:stream`, so hidden `<think>` traces 从 streamed replies 停止 surfacing as chat previews 在 normal sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/reasoning: only create a Telegram reasoning preview lane when the session is explicitly `reasoning:stream`, so hidden `<think>` traces from streamed replies stop surfacing as chat previews on normal sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram/native 命令 menu: trim long menu descriptions 之前 dropping commands so sub-100 命令 sets can still fit Telegram's payload budget 和 keep more `/` entries visible. (#61129) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/native command menu: trim long menu descriptions before dropping commands so sub-100 command sets can still fit Telegram's payload budget and keep more `/` entries visible. (#61129) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Discord: keep REST, Webhook, 和 monitor traffic 在 the configured 代理, 保留 component-only media sends, honor `@everyone` 和 `@here` mention gates, keep ACK reactions 在 the active account, 和 split 语音 connect/playback timeouts so auto-join is more reliable. (#57465, #60361, #60345) Thanks @geekhuashan.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: keep REST, webhook, and monitor traffic on the configured proxy, preserve component-only media sends, honor `@everyone` and `@here` mention gates, keep ACK reactions on the active account, and split voice connect/playback timeouts so auto-join is more reliable. (#57465, #60361, #60345) Thanks @geekhuashan.

changes.title: Discord/reply tags: strip leaked `[[reply_to_current]]` control tags 从 preview text 和 honor explicit reply-tag threading 期间 final delivery, so Discord replies stay attached to the triggering message 而不是 printing reply metadata 进入 chat.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/reply tags: strip leaked `[[reply_to_current]]` control tags from preview text and honor explicit reply-tag threading during final delivery, so Discord replies stay attached to the triggering message instead of printing reply metadata into chat.

changes.title: Discord/replies: replace the unshipped `replyToOnlyWhenBatched` flag 使用 `replyToMode: "batched"` so native reply references only attach 在 debounced multi-message turns while explicit reply tags still work.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/replies: replace the unshipped `replyToOnlyWhenBatched` flag with `replyToMode: "batched"` so native reply references only attach on debounced multi-message turns while explicit reply tags still work.

changes.title: Discord/image generation: include the real generated `MEDIA:` paths 在 工具 output, 避免 duplicate plain-output media requeueing, 和 persist volatile workspace-generated media 进入 durable outbound media 之前 final reply delivery so generated image replies 停止 pointing at missing local files.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/image generation: include the real generated `MEDIA:` paths in tool output, avoid duplicate plain-output media requeueing, and persist volatile workspace-generated media into durable outbound media before final reply delivery so generated image replies stop pointing at missing local files.

changes.title: Slack: route live DM replies back to the concrete inbound DM channel while keeping persisted routing metadata user-scoped, so normal assistant replies 停止 disappearing 当 pairing 和 system messages still arrive. (#59030) Thanks @afurm.
changes.rawTitle: Slack: route live DM replies back to the concrete inbound DM channel while keeping persisted routing metadata user-scoped, so normal assistant replies stop disappearing when pairing and system messages still arrive. (#59030) Thanks @afurm.

changes.title: WhatsApp: restore `channels.WhatsApp.blockStreaming` 和 reset watchdog timeouts 之后 reconnect so quiet chats 停止 falling 进入 reconnect loops. (#60007, #60069) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT 和 @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: restore `channels.whatsapp.blockStreaming` and reset watchdog timeouts after reconnect so quiet chats stop falling into reconnect loops. (#60007, #60069) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT and @mcaxtr.

changes.title: Android/Talk Mode: cancel 在-flight `talk.speak` playback 当 speech is explicitly stopped, 和 restore spoken replies 在 both node-scoped 和 网关-backed sessions 通过 keeping reply routing 和 embedded transport overrides aligned 使用 the current playback 路径. (#60306, #61164, #61214)
changes.rawTitle: Android/Talk Mode: cancel in-flight `talk.speak` playback when speech is explicitly stopped, and restore spoken replies on both node-scoped and gateway-backed sessions by keeping reply routing and embedded transport overrides aligned with the current playback path. (#60306, #61164, #61214)

changes.title: 语音-call/OpenAI: pass full 插件 配置 进入 realtime transcription provider resolution so streaming calls can discover the bundled OpenAI realtime transcription provider 重新. 修复 #60936. Thanks @sliekens 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Voice-call/OpenAI: pass full plugin config into realtime transcription provider resolution so streaming calls can discover the bundled OpenAI realtime transcription provider again. Fixes #60936. Thanks @sliekens and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Matrix/exec approvals: anchor seeded approval reactions to the primary Matrix prompt event, 解决 them 从 event metadata 而不是 prompt text, 和 clean up chunked approval prompts 正确地. (#60931) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/exec approvals: anchor seeded approval reactions to the primary Matrix prompt event, resolve them from event metadata instead of prompt text, and clean up chunked approval prompts correctly. (#60931) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix: recover more reliably 当 secret storage 或 recovery keys are missing 通过 recreating secret storage 期间 repair 和 backup reset, hold crypto snapshot locks 期间 persistence, 和 surface explicit too-large attachment markers. (#59846, #59851, #60599, #60289) Thanks @al3mart, @emonty, 和 @efe-arv.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix: recover more reliably when secret storage or recovery keys are missing by recreating secret storage during repair and backup reset, hold crypto snapshot locks during persistence, and surface explicit too-large attachment markers. (#59846, #59851, #60599, #60289) Thanks @al3mart, @emonty, and @efe-arv.

changes.title: Matrix/DM sessions: 添加 `channels.matrix.dm.sessionScope`, shared-session collision notices, 和 aligned outbound session 复用 so separate Matrix DM rooms can keep distinct context 当 configured. (#61373) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/DM sessions: add `channels.matrix.dm.sessionScope`, shared-session collision notices, and aligned outbound session reuse so separate Matrix DM rooms can keep distinct context when configured. (#61373) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Matrix: move legacy top-level `avatarUrl` 进入 the default account 期间 multi-account promotion 和 keep env-backed account setup avatar 配置 persisted. (#61437) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix: move legacy top-level `avatarUrl` into the default account during multi-account promotion and keep env-backed account setup avatar config persisted. (#61437) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: MS Teams: download inline DM images via Graph API 和 保留 channel reply threading 在 proactive fallback. (#52212, #55198) Thanks @Ted-developer 和 @hyojin.
changes.rawTitle: MS Teams: download inline DM images via Graph API and preserve channel reply threading in proactive fallback. (#52212, #55198) Thanks @Ted-developer and @hyojin.

changes.title: MS Teams: replace the deprecated Teams SDK HttpPlugin stub 使用 `httpServerAdapter` so recurring 网关 deprecation warnings 停止 firing 和 the Express 5 compatibility workaround stays 在 the supported SDK 路径. (#60939) Thanks @coolramukaka-sys.
changes.rawTitle: MS Teams: replace the deprecated Teams SDK HttpPlugin stub with `httpServerAdapter` so recurring gateway deprecation warnings stop firing and the Express 5 compatibility workaround stays on the supported SDK path. (#60939) Thanks @coolramukaka-sys.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: 添加 a per-session thinking-level picker 在 the chat header 和 mobile chat settings, 和 keep the 浏览器 bundle 在 界面-local thinking/session-密钥 helpers so Safari no longer crashes 在 Node-only imports 之前 rendering chat controls.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: add a per-session thinking-level picker in the chat header and mobile chat settings, and keep the browser bundle on UI-local thinking/session-key helpers so Safari no longer crashes on Node-only imports before rendering chat controls.

changes.title: Sandbox/SSH: reject hardlinked files 期间 cross-device rename fallback so EXDEV file copies 保留 the same pinned file-boundary checks as direct reads.
changes.rawTitle: Sandbox/SSH: reject hardlinked files during cross-device rename fallback so EXDEV file copies preserve the same pinned file-boundary checks as direct reads.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep 停止 visible 期间 工具-only execution, 保留 pending-send busy state, 和 clear stale ClawHub search results as soon as the query changes. (#54528, #59800, #60267) Thanks @chziyue 和 @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep Stop visible during tool-only execution, preserve pending-send busy state, and clear stale ClawHub search results as soon as the query changes. (#54528, #59800, #60267) Thanks @chziyue and @frankekn.

changes.title: Control 界面/avatar: honor `界面.assistant.avatar` 当 serving `/avatar/:agentId` so Appearance 界面 avatar paths 停止 falling back to initials placeholders. (#60778) Thanks @hannasdev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/avatar: honor `ui.assistant.avatar` when serving `/avatar/:agentId` so Appearance UI avatar paths stop falling back to initials placeholders. (#60778) Thanks @hannasdev.

changes.title: Control 界面/cron: highlight the Cron refresh button while refresh is 在 flight so the page's loading state stays visible even 当 prior data remains 在 screen. (#60394) Thanks @coder-zhuzm.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/cron: highlight the Cron refresh button while refresh is in flight so the page's loading state stays visible even when prior data remains on screen. (#60394) Thanks @coder-zhuzm.

changes.title: Control 界面/Overview: 防止 网关 access 令牌/password visibility toggle buttons 从 overlapping their inputs at narrow widths. (#56924) Thanks @bbddbb1.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Overview: prevent gateway access token/password visibility toggle buttons from overlapping their inputs at narrow widths. (#56924) Thanks @bbddbb1.

changes.title: Auto-reply: unify reply lifecycle ownership across preflight compaction, session rotation, CLI-backed runs, 和 网关 restart handling so `/停止` 和 same-session overlap checks target the right active turn 和 restart-interrupted turns return the restart notice 而不是 being 静默地 dropped. (#61267) Thanks @dutifulbob.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply: unify reply lifecycle ownership across preflight compaction, session rotation, CLI-backed runs, and gateway restart handling so `/stop` and same-session overlap checks target the right active turn and restart-interrupted turns return the restart notice instead of being silently dropped. (#61267) Thanks @dutifulbob.

changes.title: Reply delivery: 防止 duplicate block replies 在 `text_end` channels so providers that emit explicit text-end boundaries no longer double-send the same final message. (#61530)
changes.rawTitle: Reply delivery: prevent duplicate block replies on `text_end` channels so providers that emit explicit text-end boundaries no longer double-send the same final message. (#61530)

changes.title: 网关/startup: default `网关.mode` to `local` 当 unset, detect PID recycling 在 网关 lock files 在 Windows 和 macOS, 和 show startup progress so healthy restarts 停止 getting blocked 通过 stale locks. (#54801, #60085, #59843) Thanks @BradGroux 和 @TonyDerek-dot.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: default `gateway.mode` to `local` when unset, detect PID recycling in gateway lock files on Windows and macOS, and show startup progress so healthy restarts stop getting blocked by stale locks. (#54801, #60085, #59843) Thanks @BradGroux and @TonyDerek-dot.

changes.title: 网关/macOS: let launchd `KeepAlive` own 在-process 网关 restarts 重新, adding a short supervised-exit delay so rapid restarts 避免 launchd 崩溃-loop unloads while `openclaw 网关 restart` still reports real LaunchAgent errors synchronously.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/macOS: let launchd `KeepAlive` own in-process gateway restarts again, adding a short supervised-exit delay so rapid restarts avoid launchd crash-loop unloads while `openclaw gateway restart` still reports real LaunchAgent errors synchronously.

changes.title: 网关/macOS: re-bootstrap the LaunchAgent if `launchctl kickstart -k` unloads it 期间 restart so failed restarts do not leave the 网关 unmanaged until manual repair.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/macOS: re-bootstrap the LaunchAgent if `launchctl kickstart -k` unloads it during restart so failed restarts do not leave the gateway unmanaged until manual repair.

changes.title: 网关/macOS: recover installed-但是-unloaded LaunchAgents 期间 `openclaw 网关 start` 和 `restart`, while still preferring live unmanaged gateways 期间 restart recovery. (#43766) Thanks @HenryC-3.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/macOS: recover installed-but-unloaded LaunchAgents during `openclaw gateway start` and `restart`, while still preferring live unmanaged gateways during restart recovery. (#43766) Thanks @HenryC-3.

changes.title: 网关/Windows scheduled tasks: 保留 Task Scheduler settings 在 reinstall, fail loudly 当 `/Run` does not start, 和 report fast failed restarts accurately 而不是 pretending they timed out 之后 60 seconds. (#59335) Thanks @tmimmanuel.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Windows scheduled tasks: preserve Task Scheduler settings on reinstall, fail loudly when `/Run` does not start, and report fast failed restarts accurately instead of pretending they timed out after 60 seconds. (#59335) Thanks @tmimmanuel.

changes.title: Windows/restart: fall back to the installed Startup-entry launcher 当 the scheduled task was never registered, so `/restart` can relaunch the 网关 在 Windows setups where `schtasks` install fell back 期间 onboarding. (#58943) Thanks @imechZhangLY.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/restart: fall back to the installed Startup-entry launcher when the scheduled task was never registered, so `/restart` can relaunch the gateway on Windows setups where `schtasks` install fell back during onboarding. (#58943) Thanks @imechZhangLY.

changes.title: Windows/restart: clean up stale 网关 listeners 之前 Windows self-restart 和 treat listener 和 argv probe failures as inconclusive, so scheduled-task relaunch no longer falls 进入 an `EADDRINUSE` 重试 loop. (#60480) Thanks @arifahmedjoy.
changes.rawTitle: Windows/restart: clean up stale gateway listeners before Windows self-restart and treat listener and argv probe failures as inconclusive, so scheduled-task relaunch no longer falls into an `EADDRINUSE` retry loop. (#60480) Thanks @arifahmedjoy.

changes.title: 更新/npm: prefer the npm binary that owns the installed global OpenClaw prefix so mixed Homebrew-plus-nvm setups 更新 the right install. (#60153) Thanks @jayeshp19.
changes.rawTitle: Update/npm: prefer the npm binary that owns the installed global OpenClaw prefix so mixed Homebrew-plus-nvm setups update the right install. (#60153) Thanks @jayeshp19.

changes.title: Agent/music 和 video generation: 添加 `tools.media.asyncCompletion.directSend` as an opt-在 direct-delivery 路径 为了 finished async media tasks, while keeping the legacy requester-session wake/模型-delivery flow as the default.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/music and video generation: add `tools.media.asyncCompletion.directSend` as an opt-in direct-delivery path for finished async media tasks, while keeping the legacy requester-session wake/model-delivery flow as the default.

changes.title: CLI/skills JSON: route `skills list --json`, `skills info --json`, 和 `skills check --json` output to stdout 而不是 stderr so machine-readable consumers receive JSON 在 the expected stream 重新. (#60914; 修复 #57599; landed 从 contributor PR #57611 通过 @Aftabbs) Thanks @Aftabbs.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/skills JSON: route `skills list --json`, `skills info --json`, and `skills check --json` output to stdout instead of stderr so machine-readable consumers receive JSON on the expected stream again. (#60914; fixes #57599; landed from contributor PR #57611 by @Aftabbs) Thanks @Aftabbs.

changes.title: CLI/Commander: 保留 Commander-computed exit codes 为了 argument 和 help-错误 paths, 和 cover the user-argv parse mode 在 the regression tests so invalid CLI invocations no longer report success 当 exits are intercepted. (#60923) Thanks @Linux2010.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Commander: preserve Commander-computed exit codes for argument and help-error paths, and cover the user-argv parse mode in the regression tests so invalid CLI invocations no longer report success when exits are intercepted. (#60923) Thanks @Linux2010.

changes.title: Cron: replay interrupted recurring jobs 在 the first 网关 restart 而不是 waiting 为了 a second restart. (#60583) Thanks @joelnishanth.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: replay interrupted recurring jobs on the first gateway restart instead of waiting for a second restart. (#60583) Thanks @joelnishanth.

changes.title: Cron: send failure notifications through the job's primary delivery channel using the same session context as successful delivery 当 no explicit `failureDestination` is configured. (#60622) Thanks @artwalker.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: send failure notifications through the job's primary delivery channel using the same session context as successful delivery when no explicit `failureDestination` is configured. (#60622) Thanks @artwalker.

changes.title: Exec/remote skills: 停止 advertising `exec host=node` 当 the current exec policy cannot route to a node, 和 clarify blocked exec-host override errors 使用 both the requested host 和 allowed 配置 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/remote skills: stop advertising `exec host=node` when the current exec policy cannot route to a node, and clarify blocked exec-host override errors with both the requested host and allowed config path.

changes.title: Agent/Claude CLI/安全: clear inherited Claude Code 配置-root 和 插件-root env overrides like `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR` 和 `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_*`, so OpenClaw-launched Claude CLI runs cannot be 静默地 pointed at an alternate Claude 配置/插件 tree 使用 different hooks, 插件, 或 认证 context. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude CLI/security: clear inherited Claude Code config-root and plugin-root env overrides like `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR` and `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_*`, so OpenClaw-launched Claude CLI runs cannot be silently pointed at an alternate Claude config/plugin tree with different hooks, plugins, or auth context. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/Claude CLI/安全: clear inherited Claude Code provider-routing 和 managed-认证 env overrides, 和 mark OpenClaw-launched Claude CLI runs as host-managed, so Claude CLI backdoor sessions cannot be 静默地 redirected to 代理, Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry, 或 parent-managed 令牌 contexts. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude CLI/security: clear inherited Claude Code provider-routing and managed-auth env overrides, and mark OpenClaw-launched Claude CLI runs as host-managed, so Claude CLI backdoor sessions cannot be silently redirected to proxy, Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry, or parent-managed token contexts. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/Claude CLI/安全: force host-managed Claude CLI backdoor runs to `--设置-sources user`, even under custom backend arg overrides, so repo-local `.claude` project/local settings, hooks, 和 插件 discovery do not 静默地 execute inside non-interactive OpenClaw sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude CLI/security: force host-managed Claude CLI backdoor runs to `--setting-sources user`, even under custom backend arg overrides, so repo-local `.claude` project/local settings, hooks, and plugin discovery do not silently execute inside non-interactive OpenClaw sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/Claude CLI: treat malformed bare `--permission-mode` backend overrides as missing 和 fail safe back to `bypassPermissions`, so custom `cliBackends.claude-CLI.args` 安全 配置 cannot accidentally consume the next flag as a bogus permission mode. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude CLI: treat malformed bare `--permission-mode` backend overrides as missing and fail safe back to `bypassPermissions`, so custom `cliBackends.claude-cli.args` security config cannot accidentally consume the next flag as a bogus permission mode. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/device pairing: require non-admin paired-device sessions to manage only their own device 为了 令牌 rotate/revoke 和 paired-device removal, blocking cross-device 令牌 theft inside pairing-scoped sessions. (#50627) Thanks @coygeek.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/device pairing: require non-admin paired-device sessions to manage only their own device for token rotate/revoke and paired-device removal, blocking cross-device token theft inside pairing-scoped sessions. (#50627) Thanks @coygeek.

changes.title: 网关/插件 routes: keep 网关-认证 插件 runtime routes 在 write-only fallback scopes unless a trusted-代理 caller explicitly declares narrower `x-openclaw-scopes`, so 插件 HTTP handlers no longer mint admin-level runtime scopes 在 missing 或 untrusted HTTP scope headers. (#59815) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugin routes: keep gateway-auth plugin runtime routes on write-only fallback scopes unless a trusted-proxy caller explicitly declares narrower `x-openclaw-scopes`, so plugin HTTP handlers no longer mint admin-level runtime scopes on missing or untrusted HTTP scope headers. (#59815) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Build/types: 修复 the Node `createRequire(...)` helper typing so provider-runtime lazy loads compile cleanly 重新 和 `pnpm build` no longer fails 在 the Pi embedded provider 错误-pattern 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Build/types: fix the Node `createRequire(...)` helper typing so provider-runtime lazy loads compile cleanly again and `pnpm build` no longer fails in the Pi embedded provider error-pattern path.

changes.title: 网关/安全: scope loopback 浏览器-origin 认证 throttling 通过 normalized origin so one localhost Control 界面 tab cannot lock out a different localhost 浏览器 origin 之后 repeated 认证 failures.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/security: scope loopback browser-origin auth throttling by normalized origin so one localhost Control UI tab cannot lock out a different localhost browser origin after repeated auth failures.

changes.title: 网关/认证: serialize async shared-secret 认证 attempts per client so concurrent Tailscale-capable failures cannot overrun the intended 认证 rate-limit budget. Thanks @Telecaster2147.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: serialize async shared-secret auth attempts per client so concurrent Tailscale-capable failures cannot overrun the intended auth rate-limit budget. Thanks @Telecaster2147.

changes.title: Device pairing/安全: keep non-operator device scope checks bound to the requested role prefix so bootstrap verification cannot redeem `operator.*` scopes through `node` 认证. (#57258) Thanks @jlapenna.
changes.rawTitle: Device pairing/security: keep non-operator device scope checks bound to the requested role prefix so bootstrap verification cannot redeem `operator.*` scopes through `node` auth. (#57258) Thanks @jlapenna.

changes.title: Device pairing: reject rotating device tokens 进入 roles that were never approved 期间 pairing, 和 keep reconnect role checks bounded to the paired device's approved role set. (#60462) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Device pairing: reject rotating device tokens into roles that were never approved during pairing, and keep reconnect role checks bounded to the paired device's approved role set. (#60462) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 网关/device 认证: 复用 cached device-令牌 scopes only 为了 cached-令牌 reconnects, while keeping explicit `deviceToken` scope requests 和 empty-cache fallbacks intact so reconnects 保留 `operator.read` 不适用 破坏性变更 explicit 认证 flows. (#46032) Thanks @caicongyang.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/device auth: reuse cached device-token scopes only for cached-token reconnects, while keeping explicit `deviceToken` scope requests and empty-cache fallbacks intact so reconnects preserve `operator.read` without breaking explicit auth flows. (#46032) Thanks @caicongyang.

changes.title: Mobile pairing/安全: fail closed 为了 internal `/pair` setup-code issuance, cleanup, 和 approval paths 当 网关 pairing scopes are missing, 和 keep approval-time requested-scope enforcement 在 the internal 命令 路径. (#55996) Thanks @coygeek.
changes.rawTitle: Mobile pairing/security: fail closed for internal `/pair` setup-code issuance, cleanup, and approval paths when gateway pairing scopes are missing, and keep approval-time requested-scope enforcement on the internal command path. (#55996) Thanks @coygeek.

changes.title: Mobile pairing/bootstrap: keep QR bootstrap handoff tokens bounded to the mobile-safe contract so node handoff stays unscoped 和 operator handoff drops mixed `node.*`, `operator.admin`, 和 `operator.pairing` scopes.
changes.rawTitle: Mobile pairing/bootstrap: keep QR bootstrap handoff tokens bounded to the mobile-safe contract so node handoff stays unscoped and operator handoff drops mixed `node.*`, `operator.admin`, and `operator.pairing` scopes.

changes.title: Mobile pairing/Android: tighten secure endpoint handling so Tailscale 和 public remote setup reject cleartext endpoints, private LAN pairing still works, merged-role approvals mint both node 和 operator device tokens, 和 bootstrap tokens survive node auto-pair until operator approval finishes. (#60128, #60208, #60221) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Mobile pairing/Android: tighten secure endpoint handling so Tailscale and public remote setup reject cleartext endpoints, private LAN pairing still works, merged-role approvals mint both node and operator device tokens, and bootstrap tokens survive node auto-pair until operator approval finishes. (#60128, #60208, #60221) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.rawTitle: Android/canvas security: require exact normalized A2UI URL matches before forwarding canvas bridge actions, rejecting query mismatches and descendant paths while still allowing fragment-only A2UI navigation.

changes.title: Synology Chat/安全: default low-level HTTPS helper TLS verification to 在 so helper/API defaults match the shipped safe account default, 和 only explicit `allowInsecureSsl: true` opts out.
changes.rawTitle: Synology Chat/security: default low-level HTTPS helper TLS verification to on so helper/API defaults match the shipped safe account default, and only explicit `allowInsecureSsl: true` opts out.

changes.rawTitle: Synology Chat/security: route webhook token comparison through the shared constant-time secret helper for consistency with other bundled plugins.

changes.title: 插件/marketplace: block remote marketplace symlink escapes 不适用 破坏性变更 ordinary local marketplace install paths. (#60556) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/marketplace: block remote marketplace symlink escapes without breaking ordinary local marketplace install paths. (#60556) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: Telegram/local Bot API: honor `channels.Telegram.apiRoot` 为了 buffered media downloads, 添加 `channels.Telegram.network.dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwork` 为了 trusted fake-IP setups, 和 require `channels.Telegram.trustedLocalFileRoots` 之前 reading absolute Bot API `file_path` values. (#59544, #60705) Thanks @SARAMALI15792 和 @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/local Bot API: honor `channels.telegram.apiRoot` for buffered media downloads, add `channels.telegram.network.dangerouslyAllowPrivateNetwork` for trusted fake-IP setups, and require `channels.telegram.trustedLocalFileRoots` before reading absolute Bot API `file_path` values. (#59544, #60705) Thanks @SARAMALI15792 and @obviyus.

changes.title: Outbound/sanitizer: strip leaked `<tool_call>`, `<function_calls>`, 和 模型 special tokens 从 shared user-visible assistant text, including truncated 工具-call streams, so internal scaffolding no longer bleeds 进入 replies across surfaces. (#60619) Thanks @oliviareid-svg.
changes.rawTitle: Outbound/sanitizer: strip leaked `<tool_call>`, `<function_calls>`, and model special tokens from shared user-visible assistant text, including truncated tool-call streams, so internal scaffolding no longer bleeds into replies across surfaces. (#60619) Thanks @oliviareid-svg.

changes.title: Agent/errors: surface an explicit disk-full message 当 local session 或 transcript writes fail 使用 `ENOSPC`/`disk full`, so those runs 停止 degrading 进入 opaque `NO_REPLY`-style failures. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/errors: surface an explicit disk-full message when local session or transcript writes fail with `ENOSPC`/`disk full`, so those runs stop degrading into opaque `NO_REPLY`-style failures. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/Copilot: classify native GitHub Copilot API hosts 在 the shared provider endpoint resolver 和 harden 令牌-derived 代理 endpoint parsing so Copilot base URL routing stays centralized 和 fails closed 在 malformed hints. (#59644) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Copilot: classify native GitHub Copilot API hosts in the shared provider endpoint resolver and harden token-derived proxy endpoint parsing so Copilot base URL routing stays centralized and fails closed on malformed hints. (#59644) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Providers/streaming headers: centralize default and attribution header merging across OpenAI websocket, embedded-runner, and proxy stream paths so provider-specific headers stay consistent and caller overrides only win where intended. (#59542) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI-compatible routing: centralize native-vs-代理 request policy so hidden attribution 和 related OpenAI-family defaults only apply 在 verified native endpoints across stream, websocket, 和 shared audio HTTP paths. (#59433) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/Anthropic routing: centralize native-vs-代理 endpoint classification 为了 direct Anthropic `service_tier` handling so spoofed 或 proxied hosts do not inherit native Anthropic defaults. (#59608) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Anthropic routing: centralize native-vs-proxy endpoint classification for direct Anthropic `service_tier` handling so spoofed or proxied hosts do not inherit native Anthropic defaults. (#59608) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/exec loopback: restore legacy-role fallback 为了 empty paired-device 令牌 maps 和 允许 silent local role upgrades so local exec 和 node clients 停止 failing 使用 pairing-required errors 之后 `2026.3.31`. (#59092) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/exec loopback: restore legacy-role fallback for empty paired-device token maps and allow silent local role upgrades so local exec and node clients stop failing with pairing-required errors after `2026.3.31`. (#59092) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Exec approvals/配置: strip invalid `安全`, `ask`, 和 `askFallback` values 从 `~/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json` 期间 normalization so malformed policy enums fall back cleanly to the documented defaults 而不是 corrupting runtime policy resolution. (#59112) Thanks @openperf.

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/presence: send `unavailable` presence on connect in self-chat mode so personal-phone users stop losing all push notifications while the gateway is running. (#59410) Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.rawTitle: Matrix/streaming: keep live partial previews for the current assistant block while preserving completed block updates as separate messages when `channels.matrix.blockStreaming` is enabled. (#59384) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.rawTitle: MS Teams/streaming: strip already-streamed text from fallback block delivery when replies exceed the 4000-character streaming limit so long responses stop duplicating content. (#59297) Thanks @bradgroux.

Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/activation: 保留 explicit, auto-enabled, 和 default activation provenance plus reason metadata across CLI, 网关 bootstrap, 和 status surfaces so 插件 enablement state stays accurate 之后 auto-启用 resolution. (#59641) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/activation: preserve explicit, auto-enabled, and default activation provenance plus reason metadata across CLI, gateway bootstrap, and status surfaces so plugin enablement state stays accurate after auto-enable resolution. (#59641) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Exec/env: block additional host environment override pivots for package roots, language runtimes, compiler include paths, and credential/config locations so request-scoped exec cannot redirect trusted toolchains or config lookups. (#59233) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Cron/exec timeouts: surface timed-out `exec` 和 `bash` failures 在 isolated cron runs even 当 `verbose: off`, including custom session-target cron jobs, so scheduled runs 停止 failing 静默地. (#58247) Thanks @skainguyen1412.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/exec timeouts: surface timed-out `exec` and `bash` failures in isolated cron runs even when `verbose: off`, including custom session-target cron jobs, so scheduled runs stop failing silently. (#58247) Thanks @skainguyen1412.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/exec approvals: fall back to the origin session key for async approval followups and keep resume-failure status delivery sanitized so Telegram followups still land without leaking raw exec metadata. (#59351) Thanks @seonang.

items.title: Cron/exec timeouts: surface timed-out `exec` 和 `bash` failures 在 isolated cron runs even 当 `verbose: off`, including custom session-target cron jobs, so scheduled runs 停止 failing 静默地. (#58247) Thanks @skainguyen1412.
items.rawTitle: Cron/exec timeouts: surface timed-out `exec` and `bash` failures in isolated cron runs even when `verbose: off`, including custom session-target cron jobs, so scheduled runs stop failing silently. (#58247) Thanks @skainguyen1412.

changes.title: Tasks/chat: 添加 `/tasks` as a chat-native background task board 为了 the current session, 使用 recent task details 和 Agent-local fallback counts 当 no linked tasks are visible. Related #54226. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks/chat: add `/tasks` as a chat-native background task board for the current session, with recent task details and agent-local fallback counts when no linked tasks are visible. Related #54226. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web search/SearXNG: 添加 the bundled SearXNG provider 插件 为了 `web_search` 使用 configurable host 支持. (#57317) Thanks @cgdusek.
changes.rawTitle: Web search/SearXNG: add the bundled SearXNG provider plugin for `web_search` with configurable host support. (#57317) Thanks @cgdusek.

changes.title: Amazon Bedrock/Guardrails: 添加 Bedrock Guardrails 支持 to the bundled provider. (#58588) Thanks @MikeORed.
changes.rawTitle: Amazon Bedrock/Guardrails: add Bedrock Guardrails support to the bundled provider. (#58588) Thanks @MikeORed.

changes.title: macOS/语音 Wake: 添加 the 语音 Wake 选项 to trigger Talk Mode. (#58490) Thanks @SmoothExec.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/Voice Wake: add the Voice Wake option to trigger Talk Mode. (#58490) Thanks @SmoothExec.

changes.title: 飞书/comments: 添加 a dedicated Drive comment-event flow 使用 comment-thread context resolution, 在-thread replies, 和 `feishu_drive` comment actions 为了 document collaboration workflows. (#58497) Thanks @wittam-01.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/comments: add a dedicated Drive comment-event flow with comment-thread context resolution, in-thread replies, and `feishu_drive` comment actions for document collaboration workflows. (#58497) Thanks @wittam-01.

changes.title: 网关/webchat: make `chat.history` text truncation configurable 使用 `网关.webchat.chatHistoryMaxChars` 和 per-request `maxChars`, while preserving silent-reply filtering 和 existing default payload limits. (#58900)
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/webchat: make `chat.history` text truncation configurable with `gateway.webchat.chatHistoryMaxChars` and per-request `maxChars`, while preserving silent-reply filtering and existing default payload limits. (#58900)

changes.title: Agent/default params: 添加 `Agent.defaults.params` 为了 global default provider parameters. (#58548) Thanks @lpender.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/default params: add `agents.defaults.params` for global default provider parameters. (#58548) Thanks @lpender.

changes.title: Agent/failover: cap prompt-side 和 assistant-side same-provider 认证-profile retries 为了 rate-limit failures 之前 cross-provider 模型 fallback, 添加 the `认证.cooldowns.rateLimitedProfileRotations` knob, 和 document the new fallback behavior. (#58707) Thanks @Forgely3D
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: cap prompt-side and assistant-side same-provider auth-profile retries for rate-limit failures before cross-provider model fallback, add the `auth.cooldowns.rateLimitedProfileRotations` knob, and document the new fallback behavior. (#58707) Thanks @Forgely3D

changes.title: Cron/tools allowlist: 添加 `openclaw cron --tools` 为了 per-job 工具 allowlists. (#58504) Thanks @andyk-ms.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/tools allowlist: add `openclaw cron --tools` for per-job tool allowlists. (#58504) Thanks @andyk-ms.

changes.title: Channels/session routing: move provider-specific session conversation grammar 进入 插件-owned session-密钥 surfaces, preserving Telegram topic routing 和 飞书 scoped inheritance across bootstrap, 模型 override, restart, 和 工具-policy paths.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/session routing: move provider-specific session conversation grammar into plugin-owned session-key surfaces, preserving Telegram topic routing and Feishu scoped inheritance across bootstrap, model override, restart, and tool-policy paths.

changes.title: WhatsApp/reactions: 添加 `reactionLevel` guidance 为了 Agent reactions. Thanks @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/reactions: add `reactionLevel` guidance for agent reactions. Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.title: Telegram/errors: 添加 configurable `errorPolicy` 和 `errorCooldownMs` controls so Telegram can suppress repeated delivery errors per account, chat, 和 topic 不适用 muting distinct failures. (#51914) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/errors: add configurable `errorPolicy` and `errorCooldownMs` controls so Telegram can suppress repeated delivery errors per account, chat, and topic without muting distinct failures. (#51914) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar

changes.title: ZAI/模型: 添加 `glm-5.1` 和 `glm-5v-turbo` to the bundled Z.AI provider catalog. (#58793) Thanks @tomsun28
changes.rawTitle: ZAI/models: add `glm-5.1` and `glm-5v-turbo` to the bundled Z.AI provider catalog. (#58793) Thanks @tomsun28

changes.title: Agent/compaction: 解决 `Agent.defaults.compaction.模型` consistently 为了 manual `/compact` 和 other context-engine compaction paths, so engine-owned compaction uses the configured override 模型 across runtime entrypoints. (#56710) Thanks @oliviareid-svg
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: resolve `agents.defaults.compaction.model` consistently for manual `/compact` and other context-engine compaction paths, so engine-owned compaction uses the configured override model across runtime entrypoints. (#56710) Thanks @oliviareid-svg

changes.title: Chat/错误 replies: 停止 leaking raw provider/runtime failures 进入 external chat channels, return a friendly 重试 message instead, 和 添加 a specific `/new` hint 为了 Bedrock toolResult/toolUse session mismatches. (#58831) Thanks @ImLukeF.
changes.rawTitle: Chat/error replies: stop leaking raw provider/runtime failures into external chat channels, return a friendly retry message instead, and add a specific `/new` hint for Bedrock toolResult/toolUse session mismatches. (#58831) Thanks @ImLukeF.

changes.title: 网关/reload: ignore startup 配置 writes 通过 persisted hash 在 the 配置 reloader so generated 认证 tokens 和 seeded Control 界面 origins do not trigger a restart loop, while real `网关.认证.*` edits still require restart. (#58678) Thanks @yelog
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/reload: ignore startup config writes by persisted hash in the config reloader so generated auth tokens and seeded Control UI origins do not trigger a restart loop, while real `gateway.auth.*` edits still require restart. (#58678) Thanks @yelog

changes.title: Tasks/网关: keep the task registry maintenance sweep 从 stalling the 网关 event loop under synchronous SQLite pressure, so upgraded gateways 停止 hanging about a minute 之后 startup. (#58670) Thanks @openperf
changes.rawTitle: Tasks/gateway: keep the task registry maintenance sweep from stalling the gateway event loop under synchronous SQLite pressure, so upgraded gateways stop hanging about a minute after startup. (#58670) Thanks @openperf

changes.title: Tasks/status: hide stale completed background tasks 从 `/status` 和 `session_status`, prefer live task context, 和 show recent failures only 当 no active work remains. (#58661) Thanks @vincentkoc
changes.rawTitle: Tasks/status: hide stale completed background tasks from `/status` and `session_status`, prefer live task context, and show recent failures only when no active work remains. (#58661) Thanks @vincentkoc

changes.title: Tasks/网关: re-check the current task record 之前 maintenance marks runs lost 或 prunes them, so a task heartbeat 或 cleanup 更新 that lands 期间 a sweep no longer gets overwritten 通过 stale snapshot state.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks/gateway: re-check the current task record before maintenance marks runs lost or prunes them, so a task heartbeat or cleanup update that lands during a sweep no longer gets overwritten by stale snapshot state.

changes.title: Exec/approvals: honor `exec-approvals.json` 安全 defaults 当 inline 或 configured 工具 policy is unset, 和 keep Slack 和 Discord native approval handling aligned 使用 inferred approvers 和 real channel enablement so remote exec stops falling 进入 false approval timeouts 和 disabled states. Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/approvals: honor `exec-approvals.json` security defaults when inline or configured tool policy is unset, and keep Slack and Discord native approval handling aligned with inferred approvers and real channel enablement so remote exec stops falling into false approval timeouts and disabled states. Thanks @scoootscooob and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/approvals: make `允许-always` persist as durable user-approved trust 而不是 behaving like `允许-once`, 复用 exact-命令 trust 在 shell-wrapper paths that cannot safely persist an executable allowlist entry, keep static allowlist entries 从 静默地 bypassing `ask:"always"`, 和 require explicit approval 当 Windows cannot build an allowlist execution plan 而不是 hard-dead-ending remote exec. Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/approvals: make `allow-always` persist as durable user-approved trust instead of behaving like `allow-once`, reuse exact-command trust on shell-wrapper paths that cannot safely persist an executable allowlist entry, keep static allowlist entries from silently bypassing `ask:"always"`, and require explicit approval when Windows cannot build an allowlist execution plan instead of hard-dead-ending remote exec. Thanks @scoootscooob and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec/cron: 解决 isolated cron no-route approval dead-ends 从 the effective host fallback policy 当 trusted automation is allowed, 和 make `openclaw 诊断工具` warn 当 `tools.exec` is broader than `~/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json` so stricter host-policy conflicts are explicit. Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/cron: resolve isolated cron no-route approval dead-ends from the effective host fallback policy when trusted automation is allowed, and make `openclaw doctor` warn when `tools.exec` is broader than `~/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json` so stricter host-policy conflicts are explicit. Thanks @scoootscooob and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Sessions/模型 switching: keep `/模型` changes queued behind busy runs 而不是 interrupting the active turn, 和 retarget queued followups so later work picks up the new 模型 as soon as the current turn finishes.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/model switching: keep `/model` changes queued behind busy runs instead of interrupting the active turn, and retarget queued followups so later work picks up the new model as soon as the current turn finishes.

changes.title: 网关/HTTP: skip failing HTTP request stages so one broken facade no longer forces every HTTP endpoint to return 500. (#58746) Thanks @yelog
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/HTTP: skip failing HTTP request stages so one broken facade no longer forces every HTTP endpoint to return 500. (#58746) Thanks @yelog

changes.title: 网关/nodes: 停止 pinning live node commands to the approved node-pair record. Node pairing remains a trust/令牌 flow, while per-node `system.run` policy stays 在 that node's exec approvals 配置. 修复 #58824.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/nodes: stop pinning live node commands to the approved node-pair record. Node pairing remains a trust/token flow, while per-node `system.run` policy stays in that node's exec approvals config. Fixes #58824.

changes.title: WebChat/exec approvals: use native approval 界面 guidance 在 Agent system prompts 而不是 telling Agent to paste manual `/approve` commands 在 webchat sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: WebChat/exec approvals: use native approval UI guidance in agent system prompts instead of telling agents to paste manual `/approve` commands in webchat sessions. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web 界面/OpenResponses: 保留 rewritten stream snapshots 在 webchat 和 keep OpenResponses final streamed text aligned 当 模型 rewind earlier output. (#58641) Thanks @neeravmakwana
changes.rawTitle: Web UI/OpenResponses: preserve rewritten stream snapshots in webchat and keep OpenResponses final streamed text aligned when models rewind earlier output. (#58641) Thanks @neeravmakwana

changes.title: Discord/inbound media: pass Discord attachment 和 sticker downloads through the shared idle-超时 和 worker-abort 路径 so slow 或 stuck inbound media fetches 停止 hanging message processing. (#58593) Thanks @aquaright1
changes.rawTitle: Discord/inbound media: pass Discord attachment and sticker downloads through the shared idle-timeout and worker-abort path so slow or stuck inbound media fetches stop hanging message processing. (#58593) Thanks @aquaright1

changes.title: Telegram/retries: keep non-idempotent sends 在 the strict safe-send 路径, 重试 wrapped pre-connect failures, 和 保留 `429` / `retry_after` backoff 为了 safe delivery retries. (#51895) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/retries: keep non-idempotent sends on the strict safe-send path, retry wrapped pre-connect failures, and preserve `429` / `retry_after` backoff for safe delivery retries. (#51895) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar

changes.title: Telegram/exec approvals: route topic-aware exec approval followups through Telegram-owned threading 和 approval-target parsing, so forum-topic approvals stay 在 the originating topic 而不是 falling back to the root chat. (#58783)
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/exec approvals: route topic-aware exec approval followups through Telegram-owned threading and approval-target parsing, so forum-topic approvals stay in the originating topic instead of falling back to the root chat. (#58783)

changes.title: Telegram/local Bot API: 保留 media MIME types 为了 absolute-路径 downloads so local audio files still trigger transcription 和 other MIME-based handling. (#54603) Thanks @jzakirov
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/local Bot API: preserve media MIME types for absolute-path downloads so local audio files still trigger transcription and other MIME-based handling. (#54603) Thanks @jzakirov

changes.title: Channels/WhatsApp: pass inbound message timestamp to 模型 context so the AI can see 当 WhatsApp messages were sent. (#58590) Thanks @Maninae
changes.rawTitle: Channels/WhatsApp: pass inbound message timestamp to model context so the AI can see when WhatsApp messages were sent. (#58590) Thanks @Maninae

changes.title: Channels/QQ Bot: keep `/bot-logs` export gated behind a truly explicit QQBot allowlist, rejecting wildcard 和 mixed wildcard entries while preserving the real framework 命令 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/QQ Bot: keep `/bot-logs` export gated behind a truly explicit QQBot allowlist, rejecting wildcard and mixed wildcard entries while preserving the real framework command path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/插件: keep bundled channel 插件 loadable 从 legacy `channels.<id>` 配置 even under restrictive 插件 allowlists, 和 make `openclaw 诊断工具` warn only 在 real 插件 blockers 而不是 misleading setup guidance. (#58873) Thanks @obviyus
changes.rawTitle: Channels/plugins: keep bundled channel plugins loadable from legacy `channels.<id>` config even under restrictive plugin allowlists, and make `openclaw doctor` warn only on real plugin blockers instead of misleading setup guidance. (#58873) Thanks @obviyus

changes.title: 插件/bundled runtimes: restore externalized bundled 插件 runtime dependency staging across packed installs, Docker builds, 和 local runtime staging so bundled 插件 keep their declared runtime deps 之后 the 2026.3.31 externalization 更改. (#58782)
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/bundled runtimes: restore externalized bundled plugin runtime dependency staging across packed installs, Docker builds, and local runtime staging so bundled plugins keep their declared runtime deps after the 2026.3.31 externalization change. (#58782)

changes.title: LINE/runtime: 解决 the packaged runtime contract 从 the built `dist/插件/runtime` layout so LINE channels start 正确地 重新 之后 global npm installs 在 `2026.3.31`. (#58799) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: LINE/runtime: resolve the packaged runtime contract from the built `dist/plugins/runtime` layout so LINE channels start correctly again after global npm installs on `2026.3.31`. (#58799) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: MiniMax/插件: auto-启用 the bundled MiniMax 插件 为了 API-密钥 认证/配置 so MiniMax image generation 和 other 插件-owned capabilities load 不适用 manual 插件 allowlisting. (#57127) Thanks @tars90percent.
changes.rawTitle: MiniMax/plugins: auto-enable the bundled MiniMax plugin for API-key auth/config so MiniMax image generation and other plugin-owned capabilities load without manual plugin allowlisting. (#57127) Thanks @tars90percent.

changes.title: Ollama/模型 picker: show only Ollama 模型 之后 provider selection 在 the CLI picker. (#55290) Thanks @Luckymingxuan.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/model picker: show only Ollama models after provider selection in the CLI picker. (#55290) Thanks @Luckymingxuan.

changes.title: CDP/profiles: prefer `cdpPort` over stale WebSocket URLs so 浏览器 automation reconnects cleanly. (#58499) Thanks @Mlightsnow.
changes.rawTitle: CDP/profiles: prefer `cdpPort` over stale WebSocket URLs so browser automation reconnects cleanly. (#58499) Thanks @Mlightsnow.

changes.title: Media/paths: 解决 relative `MEDIA` paths against the Agent workspace so local attachment references keep working. (#58624) Thanks @aquaright1.
changes.rawTitle: Media/paths: resolve relative `MEDIA` paths against the agent workspace so local attachment references keep working. (#58624) Thanks @aquaright1.

changes.title: 内存/session indexing: keep full reindexes 从 skipping session transcripts 当 sync is triggered 通过 `session-start` 或 `watch`, so restart-driven reindexes 保留 session 内存. (#39732) Thanks @upupc
changes.rawTitle: Memory/session indexing: keep full reindexes from skipping session transcripts when sync is triggered by `session-start` or `watch`, so restart-driven reindexes preserve session memory. (#39732) Thanks @upupc

changes.title: 内存/QMD: prefer `--mask` over `--glob` 当 creating QMD collections so default 内存 collections keep their intended patterns 和 停止 colliding 在 restart. (#58643) Thanks @GitZhangChi.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: prefer `--mask` over `--glob` when creating QMD collections so default memory collections keep their intended patterns and stop colliding on restart. (#58643) Thanks @GitZhangChi.

changes.title: Subagents/tasks: keep subagent completion 和 cleanup 从 crashing 当 task-registry writes fail, so a corrupt 或 missing task row no longer takes down the 网关 期间 lifecycle finalization. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents/tasks: keep subagent completion and cleanup from crashing when task-registry writes fail, so a corrupt or missing task row no longer takes down the gateway during lifecycle finalization. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Sandbox/浏览器: compare 浏览器 runtime inspection against `Agent.defaults.sandbox.浏览器.image` so `openclaw sandbox list --浏览器` stops reporting healthy 浏览器 containers as image mismatches. (#58759) Thanks @sandpile.
changes.rawTitle: Sandbox/browser: compare browser runtime inspection against `agents.defaults.sandbox.browser.image` so `openclaw sandbox list --browser` stops reporting healthy browser containers as image mismatches. (#58759) Thanks @sandpile.

changes.title: 插件/install: forward `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` through archive 和 npm-spec 插件 installs so the documented override reaches the 安全 scanner 在 those install paths. (#58879) Thanks @ryanlee-gemini.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: forward `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` through archive and npm-spec plugin installs so the documented override reaches the security scanner on those install paths. (#58879) Thanks @ryanlee-gemini.

changes.title: Auto-reply/commands: strip inbound metadata 之前 slash 命令 detection so wrapped `/模型`, `/new`, 和 `/status` commands are recognized. (#58725) Thanks @Mlightsnow.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/commands: strip inbound metadata before slash command detection so wrapped `/model`, `/new`, and `/status` commands are recognized. (#58725) Thanks @Mlightsnow.

changes.title: Agent/Anthropic: 保留 thinking blocks 和 signatures across replay, cache-control patching, 和 context pruning so compacted Anthropic sessions continue working 而不是 failing 在 later turns. (#58916) Thanks @obviyus
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic: preserve thinking blocks and signatures across replay, cache-control patching, and context pruning so compacted Anthropic sessions continue working instead of failing on later turns. (#58916) Thanks @obviyus

changes.title: Agent/failover: unify structured 和 raw provider 错误 classification so provider-specific `400`/`422` payloads no longer get forced 进入 generic format failures 之前 重试, billing, 或 compaction logic can inspect them. (#58856) Thanks @aaron-he-zhu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: unify structured and raw provider error classification so provider-specific `400`/`422` payloads no longer get forced into generic format failures before retry, billing, or compaction logic can inspect them. (#58856) Thanks @aaron-he-zhu.

changes.title: 认证 profiles/store: coerce misplaced SecretRef objects out 的 plaintext `密钥` 和 `令牌` fields 期间 store load so Agent 不适用 ACP runtime 停止 crashing 在 `.trim()` 之后 upgrade. (#58923) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Auth profiles/store: coerce misplaced SecretRef objects out of plaintext `key` and `token` fields during store load so agents without ACP runtime stop crashing on `.trim()` after upgrade. (#58923) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: ACPX/runtime: repair `queue owner unavailable` session recovery 通过 replacing dead named sessions 和 resuming the backend session 当 ACPX exposes a stable session id, so the first ACP prompt no longer inherits a dead 处理. (#58669) Thanks @neeravmakwana
changes.rawTitle: ACPX/runtime: repair `queue owner unavailable` session recovery by replacing dead named sessions and resuming the backend session when ACPX exposes a stable session id, so the first ACP prompt no longer inherits a dead handle. (#58669) Thanks @neeravmakwana

changes.title: ACPX/runtime: 重试 dead-session queue-owner repair 不适用 `--resume-session` 当 the reported ACPX session id is stale, so recovery still creates a fresh named session 而不是 failing session init. Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX/runtime: retry dead-session queue-owner repair without `--resume-session` when the reported ACPX session id is stale, so recovery still creates a fresh named session instead of failing session init. Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 认证/OpenAI Codex: persist 插件-refreshed OAuth认证 credentials to `认证-profiles.json` 之前 returning them, so rotated Codex refresh tokens survive restart 和 停止 falling 进入 `refresh_token_reused` loops. (#53082)
changes.rawTitle: Auth/OpenAI Codex: persist plugin-refreshed OAuth credentials to `auth-profiles.json` before returning them, so rotated Codex refresh tokens survive restart and stop falling into `refresh_token_reused` loops. (#53082)

changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway: hand reconnect ownership back to Carbon, keep runtime status aligned with close/reconnect state, and force-stop sockets that open without reaching READY so Discord monitors recover promptly instead of waiting on stale health timeouts. (#59019) Thanks @obviyus

items.title: Exec/approvals: make `允许-always` persist as durable user-approved trust 而不是 behaving like `允许-once`, 复用 exact-命令 trust 在 shell-wrapper paths that cannot safely persist an executable allowlist entry, keep static allowlist entries 从 静默地 bypassing `ask:"always"`, 和 require explicit approval 当 Windows cannot build an allowlist execution plan 而不是 hard-dead-ending remote exec. Thanks @scoootscooob 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Exec/approvals: make `allow-always` persist as durable user-approved trust instead of behaving like `allow-once`, reuse exact-command trust on shell-wrapper paths that cannot safely persist an executable allowlist entry, keep static allowlist entries from silently bypassing `ask:"always"`, and require explicit approval when Windows cannot build an allowlist execution plan instead of hard-dead-ending remote exec. Thanks @scoootscooob and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Exec/cron: 解决 isolated cron no-route approval dead-ends 从 the effective host fallback policy 当 trusted automation is allowed, 和 make `openclaw 诊断工具` warn 当 `tools.exec` is broader than `~/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json` so stricter host-policy conflicts are explicit. items.rawTitle: Exec/cron: resolve isolated cron no-route approval dead-ends from the effective host fallback policy when trusted automation is allowed, and make `openclaw doctor` warn when `tools.exec` is broader than `~/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json` so stricter host-policy conflicts are explicit.
